Body and Mind.description: You have developed your body and mind to new heights. Your Dexterity and Wisdom scores increase by 4, to a maximum of 25.
Body and Mind.name: Body and Mind

Druidic.name: 德魯伊語
Druidic.description:
你知曉德魯伊語，這是一種德魯伊間的秘密語言。在學習這門古老語言的過程中，你獲悉了與動物交流的魔法；你始終準備@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplSpeakwithA]

你可以使用這門語言用它留下隱藏的資訊。懂得這門語言的人（包括你自己）會自動注意到此資訊。而不懂該語言的人通過[[/check inv 15]]檢定後也可以注意到其存在，但無法以非魔法手段解讀。

Foundry Note

Druidic and Speak with Animals are automatically added during advancement.

Disciplined Survivor.name: 隨遇而安
Disciplined Survivor.description:
Your physical and mental discipline grant you proficiency in all saving throws.

Additionally, whenever you make a saving throw and fail, you can expend 1 Focus Point to reroll it, and you must use the new roll.

Foundry Note

You will automatically be granted the additional Saving Throw proficiencies as you level up.

Use this feature to expend 1 Focus Point.

Uncanny Metabolism.name: 運氣入化
Uncanny Metabolism.description:
當你骰先攻時，你可以恢復所有已消耗的內力點。當你這麼做時，投擲你的武藝骰，並恢復等同於你武僧等級加上武藝骰結果的生命值。

一旦你使用此特性，直到你完成一次長休前無法再次使用。

Foundry Note

Using this feature will restore all expended Focus Points and offers a Healing roll for restoring your Hit Points. It includes a single free use per Long Rest.

utility.condition: You or a creature within 30 feet of you fails a saving throw against an effect that applies the Charmed or Frightened condition

Countercharm.name: Countercharm
Countercharm.description: You can use musical notes or words of power to disrupt mind-influencing effects. If you or a creature within 30 feet of you fails a saving throw against an effect that applies the Charmed or Frightened condition, you can take a Reaction to cause the save to be rerolled, and the new roll has Advantage.

Evoker.name: 塑能師
Evoker.description:
Create Explosive Elemental Effects

Your studies focus on magic that creates powerful elemental effects such as bitter cold, searing flame, rolling thunder, crackling lightning, and burning acid. Some Evokers find employment in military forces, serving as artillery to blast armies from afar. Others use their power to protect others, while some seek their own gain.

Sundered.description: Hit by a sundering blow, the next attack roll made by another creature against the target gains a +5 bonus to the roll.
Sundered.name: Sundered

Staggered.description: Hit by a staggering blow, this character has Disadvantage on the next Saving Throw it makes, and it can't make Opportunity Attacks until the start of the attacker's next turn.
Staggered.name: Staggered

Improved Brutal Strike.name: Improved Brutal Strike
Improved Brutal Strike.description:
You have honed new ways to attack furiously. The following effects are now among your Brutal Strike options.

Staggering Blow. The target has Disadvantage on the next saving throw it makes, and it can't make Opportunity Attacks until the start of your next turn.

Sundering Blow. Before the start of your next turn, the next attack roll made by another creature against the target gains a +5 bonus to the roll. An attack roll can gain only one Sundering Blow bonus.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an activity for each option which includes an Active Effect for tracking the Staggering and Sundering Blows but does not automate their effects.

Nature's Veil.description:
You invoke spirits of nature to magically hide yourself. As a Bonus Action, you can give yourself the Invisible condition until the end of your next turn.

You can use this feature a number of times equal to your Wisdom modifier (minimum of once), and you regain all expended uses when you finish a Long Rest.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which applies the Invisible condition.
Nature's Veil.name: Nature's Veil

Thirsting Blade.description:
Prerequisite: Level 5+ Warlock, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.classes24.Item.phbinvPactBlade0]{Pact of the Blade} Invocation.

You gain the Extra Attack feature for your pact weapon only. With that feature, you can attack twice with the weapon instead of once when you take the Attack action on your turn.
Thirsting Blade.name: Thirsting Blade

Deflect Energy.name: 撥擋能量
Deflect Energy.description:
You can now use your Deflect Attacks feature against attacks that deal any damage type, not just Bludgeoning, Piercing, or Slashing.

The Reduce activity can be used to heal yourself to reduce the total damage if it's not enough to reduce it to 0.

The Redirect activity can be used to roll damage and consume a use of your Focus Points if you can reduce it to 0. You can select the type of damage in the roll dialog. The dice increase automatically as you level up.

Reduce.name: Reduce
Reduce.condition: When an attack roll hits you and its damage includes Bludgeoning, Piercing, or Slashing damage

Redirect.name: Redirect
Redirect.condition: If you reduce the damage to 0

Pact of the Blade.name: 鋒刃魔契
Pact of the Blade.description:
作為附贈動作，你可以從手中召喚一把你所選擇的簡易或軍用武器—該武器即為與你聯結的契約武器，或是與你所觸碰的魔法武器建立聯結。你無法與已被其他契術師聯結或已被他人同調的魔法武器建立聯結。直到聯結終止前，你擁有該武器的熟練，並可以將其作為施法法器。

每當你以聯結武器進行攻擊，你可以使用魅力調整值代替力量或敏捷進行攻擊和傷害擲骰，並且你可以使武器造成黯蝕、心靈、光耀傷害，或是武器原本的傷害類型。

若你再次使用此特性的附贈動作，或武器距離你5呎以上超過1分鐘，或你死亡時，則你與武器的聯結終止。召喚的武器在聯結終止時消失。

Draconic Resilience.name: 龍族韌性
Draconic Resilience.description:
魔法在你體內流動，使你龍族贈禮的物理特徵開始浮現。你的生命值最大值增加3點，且每當你提升術士等級時都會再增加1點。

此外，你一部份的肌膚將會覆蓋著龍族般的鱗片。當你未穿戴護甲時，你的AC等於10 + 你的敏捷調整值 + 你的魅力調整值

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect that automatically increases your Hit Point maximum and sets up your Unarmored Defense which can be disabled if you would prefer to use armor.

Hunter's Prey.name: 狩者獵物
Hunter's Prey.description:
你獲得下列一項你所選擇的特性。每當你完成短休或長休時，你可以用另一項特性來替換所選特性。

【斬殺者】你強而有力的攻擊可以擊倒最強壯的對手。當你以武器命中生物時，若目標失去過任何生命值，則武器額外造成1d8傷害。你每回合只能造成一次此額外傷害。

【破陣者】你每回合一次，當你以武器進行攻擊時，你可以用同一武器對武器範圍內位於原目標5呎內的另一個此回合尚未被你攻擊過的不同生物發動一次攻擊。

Foundry Note

This feature includes a Colossus Slayer activity for the additional damage. You can select the correct damage type in the roll dialog.

For the Horde Breaker option simply make another attack.

damage.condition: 每回合一次當你以武器命中一個生物時

phbwlkEpicBoon00.name: 史詩恩惠
phbwlkEpicBoon00.description:
You gain an @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbFeats00000000.JournalEntryPage.GxfrwkJbrIvn7reC]{Epic Boon feat} or another feat of your choice for which you qualify. @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.feats.Item.phbBoonofFate000]{Boon of Fate} is recommended.

Foundry Note

You will be prompted for a choice while leveling up.

Divine Order.name: 神聖使命
Divine Order.description:
你已將自己奉獻給下列一種神聖使命：

【守護者】接受戰鬥訓練後，你獲得軍用武器熟練與重甲訓練。

【奇術使】你額外知曉一個 @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.SkHptN2PTzFGDaEj]{牧師法術列表}中的戲法。此外，你與神明的緊密聯繫使你的智力（奧秘或宗教）檢定獲得等同於感知調整值的加值（至少+1）。

Foundry Note

During advancement you will be able to choose which option you prefer.

Fiendish Resilience.name: 邪魔韌性
Fiendish Resilience.description:
Choose one damage type, other than Force, whenever you finish a Short or Long Rest. You have Resistance to that damage type until you choose a different one with this feature.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect for each type of damage which will grant you the correct Resistance. Apply and disable the effects as necessary when you change types.

Heroic Warrior.description: The thrill of battle drives you toward victory. During combat, you can give yourself Heroic Inspiration whenever you start your turn without it.
Heroic Warrior.name: Heroic Warrior

Second Wind.name: 回氣
Second Wind.description:
你的身心都儲有底力，能夠從中汲取力量。作為一個附贈動作，你恢復1d10 + 你戰士等級的生命值。

你可以使用此特性兩次。當你完成短休時重獲一次已消耗的使用次數，並在完成長休時重獲所有已消耗的使用次數。

當你達到特定的戰士等級後，你將獲得更多此特性的使用次數，如@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbFighter000000.JournalEntryPage.wDELe3k25FQvYdrq#class-features]{戰士特性}表中的回氣一欄所示。

Foundry Note

This feature automatically scales in usage and recovers the correct number of uses on a Short and Long Rest.

Cutting Words.name: 語出驚人
Cutting Words.description: 你學會運用你的妙語連珠來打斷敵人，迷惑或影響他人的信心。當你自身60呎內一個你所能看見的生物擲出傷害骰或成功通過能力檢定或攻擊檢定時，你可以採取反應並消耗一次吟遊激勵，擲出吟遊激勵骰並以該結果減少生物的擲骰結果，此舉將減少造成的傷害或可能成功轉為失敗。

Cut with Words.name: 語出驚人
Cut with Words.condition: 60呎內你所能看見的生物進行傷害骰或是通過屬性檢定或攻擊檢定。

Life Domain.name: 生命領域
Life Domain.description:
Soothe the Hurts of the World

The Life Domain focuses on the positive energy that helps sustain all life in the multiverse. Clerics who tap into this domain are masters of healing, using that life force to cure many hurts.

Existence itself relies on the positive energy associated with this domain, so a Cleric of almost any religious tradition might choose it. This domain is particularly associated with agricultural deities, gods of healing or endurance, and gods of home and community. Religious orders of healing also seek the magic of this domain.

Lifedrinker.description:
Prerequisite: Level 9+ Warlock, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.classes24.Item.phbinvPactBlade0]{Pact of the Blade} Invocation

Once per turn when you hit a creature with your pact weapon, you can deal an extra 1d6 Necrotic, Psychic, or Radiant damage (your choice) to the creature, and you can expend one of your Hit Point Dice to roll it and regain a number of Hit Points equal to the roll plus your Constitution modifier (minimum of 1 Hit Point).

Foundry Note

The Damage activity allows you to choose the type of damage in the roll's dialog. It will remember your choice going forward.

The Heal (Largest Hit Die) and Smallest Hit Die activities expends the relevant Hit Die and provides a healing roll with your Constitution modifier included. Which you choose only matters if you are multi-classed with multiple hit die types.
Lifedrinker.name: Lifedrinker

damage.condition: Once per turn when you hit a creature with your pact weapon

Heal (Smallest Hit Die).name: Heal (Smallest Hit Die)
Heal (Smallest Hit Die).condition: Once per turn when you hit a creature with your pact weapon

Heal (Largest Hit Die).name: Heal (Largest Hit Die)
Heal (Largest Hit Die).condition: Once per turn when you hit a creature with your pact weapon

phbwzdEpicBoon00.description:
You gain an @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbFeats00000000.JournalEntryPage.GxfrwkJbrIvn7reC]{Epic Boon feat} or another feat of your choice for which you qualify. @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.feats.Item.phbBoonofSpellRe]{Boon of Spell Recall} is recommended.

Foundry Note

You will be prompted for a choice while leveling up.
phbwzdEpicBoon00.name: 史詩恩惠

Visions of Distant Realms.name: Visions of Distant Realms
Visions of Distant Realms.description:
Prerequisite: Level 9+ Warlock

You can cast @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplArcaneEye0]{Arcane Eye} without expending a spell slot.

Foundry Note

This feature can be used in place of Arcane Eye and includes a Summon activity.

Feral Instinct.description: Your instincts are so honed that you have Advantage on Initiative rolls.
Feral Instinct.name: Feral Instinct

Eldritch Mind.name: 魔能意志
Eldritch Mind.description: 你在保持專注的體質豁免檢定上具有優勢。

Monk's Focus.name: 武僧內功
Monk's Focus.description:
你的心法以及武藝的訓練，使你得以掌握自身非凡的能量，而內力點則代表著這股能量。你的武僧等級將決定你擁有多少內力點，具體內力點詳見武僧特性表。

你可以消耗內力點以增強或啟用特定的武僧特性，你一開始知曉三個這類特性：疾風連擊、堅強防禦、行步如風。能力細節詳見下方。

當你消耗1點內力時，直到你完成一次長休或短休時，該內力點都無法再使用。在完成長休或短休後，你將重獲所有已消耗的內力點。

某些使用內力點的特性需要目標進行豁免檢定。豁免DC = 8+你的感知調整值+你的熟練加值。

【疾風連擊】你可以消耗1內力點以附贈動作進行兩次徒手打擊。

【閃轉騰挪】你能以附贈動作採取撤離動作。或者，你可以消耗1內力點，以附贈動作同時採取撤離和迴避兩個動作。

【疾步如風】你能以附贈動作採取疾走動作。或者，你可以消耗1內力點，以附贈動作同時採取撤離和疾走兩個動作，且該回合內你的跳躍距離翻倍。

Foundry Note

The Flurry of Blows activity is a Bonus Action which expends a Focus Point and includes the Attack Roll and Damage for an Unarmored Strike using your Martial Arts Die which automatically scales as you level up.

The Patient Defense Bonus Action activity includes an Active Effect for tracking that you're Disengaged. The Patient Defense (Focus Point) activity expends a Focus Point and includes an Active Effect that adds the Dodging status.

The Step of the Wind Bonus Action activity expends 1 Focus Point and includes an Active Effect for tracking that you're Disengaged.

phbwzdSpellcasti.description:
作為一名奧術魔法的研習者，你已習得如何施放法術。見第7章的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.mh3akteBDiLegqFK]{施法規則}。以下資訊詳細說明了如何將這些規則與法師法術結合使用。法師法術即該職業描述後的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.6AnqLUowgdsqMFvz]{法師法術列表}中羅列的法術。

【戲法】你知曉三個你所選擇的法師戲法。推薦選擇@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplLight00000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplMageHand00]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplRayofFrost]。每當你完成長休後，你可以將一個從此特性獲得的戲法替換為另一個你所選擇的法師戲法。

當你達到法師4級和10級時，你習得一個新的法師戲法，如@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbWizard0000000.JournalEntryPage.g7cMRWzsgAsEF7zC#class-features]{法師特性表}中戲法一欄所示。

【法術書】你的法師學徒生涯因完成一本獨特的書而劃上句號—你的法術書。這本書是一個微型物件，重 3 磅，有 100 頁，只能由你或施放@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplIdentify00]的人閱讀。你可以自行決定書的外觀和材料，例如鍍金邊的小冊子或用麻繩捆綁的牛皮紙集。

這本書囊括了所有你所知曉1環以上的法術。起初，書中記錄著六個你所選擇的1環法師法術。推薦選擇@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplDetectMagi]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplFeatherFal]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplMageArmor0]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplMagicMissi]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplSleep00000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplThunderwav]。

此後，每當你獲得法師等級時，將兩個你所選擇的法師法術加入你的法術書中。你只能加入已經獲得相應環階法術位的法術，如法師特性表所示。這些法術是你定期進行奧術研究的結晶。

【法術位】法師特性表記錄了你有多少法術位以施放1環以上的法術。當你完成長休時，你會重獲所有消耗的法術位。

【準備1環以上的法術】通過此特性施法前，你需要準備數個可用的1環以上法術所構成的準備列表。從你的法術書中選擇四個法術，所選法術必須是你已經獲得相應環階法術位的法術。

你的準備列表上的法術數量將隨著法師等級而增加，如法師特性表中準備法術一欄所示。每當該數量增加時，選擇額外的法師法術來添加到你的準備列表中，直到你準備列表上的法術數量與法師特性表中的數量相匹配。所選法術的環階必須是你擁有的法術位。例如，作為 3 級法師，你的準備法術列表應該包括六個從你法術書中任意組合的1環或2環法術。

若其他的法師特性給予你額外的始終準備法術，這些法術不會計入你以此特性中的準備法術數量，但是這些法術對你而言仍視為法師法術。

【更換準備法術】每當你完成長休時，你可以更改準備法術列表，將其中的任意個法術替換為你法術書中的法術。

【施法屬性】智力是你施放法師法術的施法屬性。

【施法法器】 你可以使用奧術法器或你的法術書作為法師法術的施法法器。
phbwzdSpellcasti.name: 施法

Words of Creation.description:
You have mastered two of the Words of Creation: the words of life and death. You therefore always have the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplPowerWordH]{Power Word Heal} and @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplPowerWordK]{Power Word Kill} spells prepared. When you cast either spell, you can target a second creature with it if that creature is within 10 feet of the first target.

Foundry Note

You are automatically granted these spells as you level up.
Words of Creation.name: Words of Creation

Gaze of Two Minds.description:
Prerequisite: Level 5+ Warlock

You can use a Bonus Action to touch a willing creature and perceive through its senses until the end of your next turn. As long as the creature is on the same plane of existence as you, you can take a Bonus Action on subsequent turns to maintain this connection, extending the duration until the end of your next turn. The connection ends if you don't maintain it in this way.

While perceiving through the other creature's senses, you benefit from any special senses possessed by that creature, and you can cast spells as if you were in your space or the other creature's space if the two of you are within 60 feet of each other.
Gaze of Two Minds.name: Gaze of Two Minds

Lay on Hands.name: 聖療
Lay on Hands.description:
你的觸碰溢滿祝福，可以醫治傷口。你擁有一個每次長休後會補滿的治療能量池。能量池可恢復生命值的總數等於你聖騎士等級的五倍。能量池可以恢復生命值的總數等同於你聖騎士等級的五倍。

作為附贈動作，你可以觸碰一個生物（可以是你自己）並汲取治療池中的能量來恢復該生物的生命值，其恢復量至多等同於你治療能量池中所剩餘的治療量。

你也可以消耗治療能量池的5點治療量以移除生物的中毒狀態，但這些治療量不會恢復生物的生命值。

Foundry Note

The Heal activity allows you to select the number of Hit Points you would like to restore and reduces your Lay on Hands pool by that amount.

The Remove Poison activity reduces your pool by 5 but does not automatically remove the Poisoned condition.

Studied Attacks.name: Studied Attacks
Studied Attacks.description:
You study your opponents and learn from each attack you make. If you make an attack roll against a creature and miss, you have Advantage on your next attack roll against that creature before the end of your next turn.

Foundry Note

This feature does not automate the Advantage on your next attack roll.

Frenzy.name: Frenzy
Frenzy.description:
If you use Reckless Attack while your Rage is active, you deal extra damage to the first target you hit on your turn with a Strength-based attack. To determine the extra damage, roll a number of d6s equal to your Rage Damage bonus, and add them together. The damage has the same type as the weapon or Unarmed Strike used for the attack.

Foundry Note

The Damage activity scales automatically as you level up and allows you to select the type of damage to use in the damage roll's dialog box. It will then remember your choice going forward.

phbdrdSpellcasti.name: 施法
phbdrdSpellcasti.description:
透過深入了解大自然的奇妙力量，你學會了施法。有關施法的規則請參見@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.mh3akteBDiLegqFK]{第7章}。以下資訊詳細說明了如何將這些規則與德魯伊法術結合使用。德魯伊法術即該職業描述後的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.LhvuDQEyrCdg5EfU]{德魯伊法術列表}中羅列的法術。

【戲法】你知曉兩個從德魯伊法術列表中你所選擇的戲法。推薦選擇@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplDruidcraft]和@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplProduceFla]。

每當你獲得德魯伊等級時，你可以將一個戲法替換為另一個德魯伊法術列表中你所選擇的戲法。

當你達到德魯伊4級和10級時，你可以從德魯伊法術列表中習得一個新的戲法，如@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbDruid00000000.JournalEntryPage.UCOh3zlvGxyk5jLr#class-features]{德魯伊特性}表中戲法一欄所示。

【法術位】 The Druid Features table記錄了你有多少法術位以施放1環以上的法術。當你完成長休時，你會重獲所有消耗的法術位。

【準備1環以上的法術】通過此特性施法前，你需要準備數個可用的1環以上法術所構成的準備列表。首先，從德魯伊法術列表中選擇四個 1 環法術。推薦選擇@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplAnimalFrie]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplCureWounds]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplFaerieFire]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplThunderwav]。

你的準備列表上的法術數量將隨著德魯伊等級而增加，如德魯伊特性表中準備法術一欄所示。每當該數量增加時，從德魯伊法術列表中選擇額外的法術來添加到你的準備列表中，直到你準備列表上的法術數量與德魯伊特性表中的數量相匹配。所選法術的環階必須是你擁有的法術位。例如，作為 3 級德魯伊，你的準備法術列表應該包括六個任意組合的1環或2環法術。

如果其他的德魯伊特性給予了額外始終準備的法術，這些法術不會計入你在此特性中的準備法術數量，但是這些法術對你而言仍視為德魯伊法術。

【更換準備法術】每當你完成長休時，你可以更改準備法術列表，將其中的任意個法術替換為其他你擁有法術位的德魯伊法術。

【施法屬性】 感知是你施放德魯伊法術的施法屬性。

【施法法器】 你可以使用德魯伊法器作為德魯伊法術的施法法器。

Improved Cunning Strike.name: Improved Cunning Strike
Improved Cunning Strike.description:
You can use up to two Cunning Strike effects when you deal Sneak Attack damage, paying the die cost for each effect.

Foundry Note

After using Cunning Strike effects use the [[/item Cunning Strike activity=Cunning Sneak Attack]]{Cunning Sneak Attack} activity. It will prompt you to select how many dice you expended on effects and deduct them from your Sneak Attack roll automatically.

You can control the damage type in the damage roll dialog box.

phbrgeEvasion000.name: Evasion
phbrgeEvasion000.description:
You can nimbly dodge out of the way of certain dangers. When you're subjected to an effect that allows you to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, you instead take no damage if you succeed on the saving throw and only half damage if you fail. You can't use this feature if you have the Incapacitated condition.

Foundry Note

With your token selected you can either right click on the damage roll's chat card and select  Apply Half Damage or click the "1/2" button and then the  Apply button.

Pact Magic.name: 契約魔法
Pact Magic.description:
通過玄妙的儀式，你與一個神秘實體簽訂了契約，獲得了魔法力量。該實體有如陰影中的呢喃，其本體更是尚不可知，但他對你的益處卻是肉眼可見的：你可以施展法術了。參見第7章的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.mh3akteBDiLegqFK]{施法規則}。以下資訊詳細說明了如何將這些規則與契術師法術結合使用。契術師法術即該職業描述後的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.sSzagq8GvYXpfmfs]{契術師法術列表}中羅列的法術。

【戲法】你知曉兩個你所選擇的契術師戲法。推薦選擇@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplEldritchBl]和@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplPrestidigi]。每當你獲得契術師等級時，你可以將一個從此特性獲得的戲法替換為另一個你所選擇的契術師戲法。

當你達到契術師4級和10級時，你將習得一個新的契術師戲法，如契術師特性表中戲法一欄所示。

當前最大戲法： [[lookup @scale.warlock.cantrips-known]]

【法術位】@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbWarlock000000.JournalEntryPage.znue6EaGDDXgeQb0#class-features]{契術師特性表}記錄了你有多少法術位以施放1–5環的契術師法術。表格中也記錄法術位對應的法術環階，且所有的法術位都屬於同一環階。當你完成短休或長休時，你重獲所有已消耗的契約魔法法術位。

例如，作為5級契術師，你擁有兩枚3環法術位。為了施展1環法術@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplWitchBolt0]，你必須消耗其中一枚法術位，將該法術作為一道3環法術施放。

【準備1環以上的法術】通過此特性施法前，你需要準備數個可用的1環以上法術所構成的準備列表。首先，選擇兩個1環契術師法術。推薦選擇@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplCharmPerso]和@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplHex0000000]。

當前最大準備法術：[[lookup @scale.warlock.max-prepared]]

你的準備列表上的法術數量將隨著契術師等級而增加，如契術師特性表中準備法術一欄所示。每當該數量增加時，選擇額外的契術師法術來添加到你的準備列表中，直到你準備列表上的法術數量與契術師特性表中的數量相匹配。所選法術的環階不能超過表中法術位環階一欄中你當前等級所記錄的數值。例如，當你到達6級時，你可以從1–3環的契術師法術中習得一個新的契術師法術。

若其他的契術師特性給予你始終準備的法術，則這些法術不會計入你在此特性中的準備法術數量，但是這些法術對你而言仍視為契術師法術。

【更換準備法術】每當你獲得契術師等級時，你可以將準備列表中的一個法術，替換為另一個符合準備條件的契術師法術。

【施法屬性】魅力是你施放契術師法術的施法屬性。

【施法法器】你可以使用奧術法器作為契術師法術的施法法器。

Devil's Sight.name: 魔鬼視覺
Devil's Sight.description:
先決條件：契術師等級2以上

你可以在微光或黑暗中正常看見距離你120呎範圍內的事物，無論該黑暗是有魔力或無魔力的。

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect that grants you darkvision to 120 feet.

Warrior of the Open Hand.name: 散打武者
Warrior of the Open Hand.description:
Master Unarmed Combat Techniques

Warriors of the Open Hand are masters of unarmed combat. They learn techniques to push and trip their opponents and manipulate their own energy to protect themselves from harm.

Investment of the Chain Master.name: Investment of the Chain Master
Investment of the Chain Master.description:
Prerequisite: Level 5+ Warlock, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.classes24.Item.phbinvPactChain0]{Pact of the Chain} Invocation

When you cast @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplFindFamili]{Find Familiar}, you infuse the summoned familiar with a measure of your eldritch power, granting the creature the following benefits.

Aerial or Aquatic. The familiar gains either a Fly Speed or a Swim Speed (your choice) of 40 feet.

Quick Attack. As a Bonus Action, you can command the familiar to take the Attack action.

Necrotic or Radiant Damage. Whenever the familiar deals Bludgeoning, Piercing, or Slashing damage, you can make it deal Necrotic or Radiant damage instead.

Your Save DC. If the familiar forces a creature to make a saving throw, it uses your spell save DC.

Resistance. When the familiar takes damage, you can take a Reaction to grant it Resistance against that damage.

Foundry Note

The Find Familiar with Flight and with Swimming activities both allow you to summon a familiar with the relevant movement bonus. Both activities consume a Pact Magic spell slot.

The Invest with Resistance activity includes an Active Effect for resisting each type of damage which can be applied to get the relevant resistance. Be sure you disable/delete the previous Active Effect in the "Effects" tab of your sheet when you change Resistances.

The familiar automatically uses your Save DC.

Extended Spell.name: 延時法術
Extended Spell.description:
消耗：1術法點

當你施放持續時間不短於1分鐘的法術時，你可以消耗1術法點使法術的持續時間翻倍且至多不超過 24 小時。

若受影響的法術需要專注，則你為維持該專注而進行的體質豁免檢定具有優勢。

Extended Spell.name: 延時法術
Extended Spell.condition: 當你施放持續時間不短於 1 分鐘的法術時

Superior Inspiration.description: When you roll Initiative, you regain expended uses of Bardic Inspiration until you have two if you have fewer than that.
Superior Inspiration.name: Superior Inspiration

Mystic Arcanum (9th level).hint: Choose one level 9 Warlock spell as this arcanum. You can cast your arcanum spell without expending a spell slot, and you must finish a Long Rest before you can cast it this way again.
Mystic Arcanum (9th level).title: Mystic Arcanum (9th level)

Mystic Arcanum (8th level).title: Mystic Arcanum (8th level)
Mystic Arcanum (8th level).hint: Choose one level 8 Warlock spell as this arcanum. You can cast your arcanum spell without expending a spell slot, and you must finish a Long Rest before you can cast it this way again.

Mystic Arcanum (7th level).hint: Choose one level 7 Warlock spell as this arcanum. You can cast your arcanum spell without expending a spell slot, and you must finish a Long Rest before you can cast it this way again.
Mystic Arcanum (7th level).title: Mystic Arcanum (7th level)

Mystic Arcanum (6th level).title: Mystic Arcanum (6th level)
Mystic Arcanum (6th level).hint: Choose one level 6 Warlock spell as this arcanum. You can cast your arcanum spell without expending a spell slot, and you must finish a Long Rest before you can cast it this way again.

Mystic Arcanum.description:
Your patron grants you a magical secret called an arcanum. Choose one level 6 Warlock spell as this arcanum.

You can cast your arcanum spell once without expending a spell slot, and you must finish a Long Rest before you can cast it in this way again.

You gain another Warlock spell of your choice that can be cast in this way when you reach Warlock levels 13 (level 7 spell), 15 (level 8 spell), and 17 (level 9 spell). You regain all uses of your Mystic Arcanum when you finish a Long Rest.

Whenever you gain a Warlock level, you can replace one of your arcanum spells with another Warlock spell of the same level.
Mystic Arcanum.name: Mystic Arcanum

Uncanny Dodge.condition: When an attacker that you can see hits you with an attack roll
Uncanny Dodge.name: Uncanny Dodge
Uncanny Dodge
Uncanny Dodge.description:
When an attacker that you can see hits you with an attack roll, you can take a Reaction to halve the attack's damage against you (round down).

Foundry Note

With your token selected you can either right click on the damage roll's chat card and select  Apply Half Damage or click the "1/2" button and then the  Apply button.

phbpdnFightingSt.name: 戰鬥風格
phbpdnFightingSt.description:
你獲得你一項你所選擇的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbFeats00000000.JournalEntryPage.sbHImaCB8ZMEHYkb]{戰鬥風格專長}。你可以選擇以下選項，而非上述這些專長。

@Embed[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.feats.Item.phbfstBlessedWar caption=false]

Superior Hunter's Prey.name: 高等狩者獵物
Superior Hunter's Prey.description:
Once per turn when you deal damage to a creature marked by your Hunter’s Mark, you can also deal that spell’s extra damage to a different creature that you can see within 30 feet of the first creature.

Foundry Note

You can apply the damage from Hunter's Mark or use the Damage activity on this feature.

Supreme Sneak.name: Supreme Sneak
Supreme Sneak.description:
You gain the following Cunning Strike option.

Stealth Attack (Cost: 1d6). If you have the &Reference[Hide] action's Invisible condition, this attack doesn't end that condition on you if you end the turn behind &Reference[Three-Quarters Cover] or &Reference[Total Cover].

Improved Elemental Fury.description:
The option you chose for Elemental Fury grows more powerful, as detailed below.

Potent Spellcasting. When you cast a Druid cantrip with a range of 10 feet or greater, the spell's range increases by 300 feet.

Primal Strike. The extra damage of your Primal Strike increases to 2d8.

Foundry Note

The damage for Primal Strike is automatically increased at this level. This feature does not automate the range changes.
Improved Elemental Fury.name: Improved Elemental Fury

Innate Sorcery.name: 天生術法
Innate Sorcery.description:
某個奇怪事件在你身上留下了無法磨滅的印記，為你注入了湧動的魔力。作為附贈動作，你可以釋放該魔力，持續1分鐘。在此期間你獲得下列好處：

  • 你的術士法術的法術豁免DC提升1。
  • 你施放術士法術進行的攻擊檢定具有優勢。

你可以使用此特性兩次，並在你完成長休時重獲所有已消耗的使用次數。

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which will increase your spell save DC. The Advantage on attack rolls is not automated.

Innate Sorcery.name: Innate Sorcery
Innate Sorcery.description:
你的術士法術的法術豁免DC提升1。（自動附加）

你施放術士法術進行的攻擊檢定具有優勢。（非自動附加）

Holy Nimbus.description:
As a Bonus Action, you can imbue your Aura of Protection with holy power, granting the benefits below for 10 minutes or until you end them (no action required). Once you use this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a Long Rest. You can also restore your use of it by expending a level 5 spell slot (no action required).

Holy Ward. You have Advantage on any saving throw you are forced to make by a Fiend or an Undead.

Radiant Damage. Whenever an enemy starts its turn in the aura, that creature takes Radiant damage equal to your Charisma modifier plus your Proficiency Bonus.

Sunlight. The aura is filled with Bright Light that is sunlight.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect for tracking your Holy Nimbus but it does not automate the Advantage on Saving Throws.

The Holy Nimbus activity includes a damage roll.

The Regain Use activity will consume a 5th level spell slot and restore a use of this feature.
Holy Nimbus.name: Holy Nimbus

Pact of the Tome.name: 書卷魔契
Pact of the Tome.description:
將暗影絲線縫合拼接，你將一本書於短休或長休結束後召喚至手中。這本@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.classes.Item.phbwlkBookOfShad]{影之書}（其外形由你決定）中的神秘魔法僅有你可以使用，給予你以下好處。這本書會在你通過該特性召喚另一本書或你死亡時消失。

【戲法和儀式】當這本書出現時，選擇三個戲法和兩個帶有儀式標籤的一環法術。這些法術可以來自任意職業的法術列表，且必須是你尚未準備的法術。只要這本書在你身上，你將準備著所有所選法術，且這些法術對你而言視為契術師法術。

【施法法器】你可以使用這本書作為施法法器。

Reckless Attack.name: 魯莽攻擊
Reckless Attack.description:
你可以拋下防禦以展開不顧一切的猛烈攻擊。當你在自己回合進行第一次攻擊時，你可以選擇魯莽地攻擊。這麼做直到你下回合開始時，會讓你使用力量的攻擊檢定具有優勢，但在該持續時間內對你的攻擊檢定也具有優勢。

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect for tracking whether you are reckless or not but it does not automate Advantage on your attacks or attacks against you.

Cunning Sneak Attack.name: Cunning Sneak Attack
Cunning Sneak Attack.condition: When you deal Sneak Attack damage

Withdraw.condition: When you deal Sneak Attack damage
Withdraw.name: Withdraw

Poison.name: Poison
Poison.condition: When you deal Sneak Attack damage

Trip.condition: When you deal Snack Attack damage
Trip.name: Trip

Cunning Strike: Poisoned.description: On a failed save, the target has the Poisoned condition for 1 minute.
Cunning Strike: Poisoned.name: Cunning Strike: Poisoned

Cunning Strike.name: Cunning Strike
Cunning Strike.description:
You've developed cunning ways to use your Sneak Attack. When you deal Sneak Attack damage, you can add one of the following Cunning Strike effects. Each effect has a die cost, which is the number of Sneak Attack damage dice you must forgo to add the effect. You remove the die before rolling, and the effect occurs immediately after the attack's damage is dealt. For example, if you add the Poison effect, remove 1d6 from the Sneak Attack's damage before rolling.

If a Cunning Strike effect requires a saving throw, the DC equals 8 plus your Dexterity modifier and Proficiency Bonus.

Poison (Cost: 1d6). You add a toxin to your strike, forcing the target to make a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, the target has the &Reference[Poisoned] condition for 1 minute. At the end of each of its turns, the Poisoned target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success.

To use this effect, you must have a Poisoner's Kit on your person.

Trip (Cost: 1d6). If the target is Large or smaller, it must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or have the &Reference[Prone] condition.

Withdraw (Cost: 1d6). Immediately after the attack, you move up to half your Speed without provoking Opportunity Attacks.

Foundry Note

After using Cunning Strike effects use the Cunning Sneak Attack activity on this feature. It will prompt you to select how many dice you expended on effects and deduct them from your Sneak Attack roll automatically.

You can select the damage type in the damage roll dialog.

The Poison activity includes an Active Effect that applies the Poisoned condition.

The Trip activity includes an Active Effect that applies the Prone condition or you can use the inline condition above.

Danger Sense.name: 危險感知
Danger Sense.description: 你獲得對周遭異常情況超乎尋常的感測力，讓你能先一步脫離危險。除非你陷入無力&Reference[Incapacitated]狀態，你在敏捷豁免上具有優勢。

Luck.condition: When you make an ability check or saving throw
Luck.name: Luck

Dark One's Own Luck.description:
You can call on your fiendish patron to alter fate in your favor. When you make an ability check or a saving throw, you can use this feature to add 1d10 to your roll. You can do so after seeing the roll but before any of the roll's effects occur.

You can use this feature a number of times equal to your Charisma modifier (minimum of once), but you can use it no more than once per roll. You regain all expended uses when you finish a Long Rest.
Dark One's Own Luck.name: Dark One's Own Luck

Wholeness of Body.name: Wholeness of Body
Wholeness of Body.description:
You gain the ability to heal yourself. As a Bonus Action, you can roll your Martial Arts die. You regain a number of Hit Points equal to the number rolled plus your Wisdom modifier (minimum of 1 Hit Point regained).

You can use this feature a number of times equal to your Wisdom modifier (minimum of once), and you regain all expended uses when you finish a Long Rest.

Cunning Action.name: 靈巧動作
Cunning Action.description: 你精妙的反應與身手使你的行動無比迅速。在你的回合中，你可以採取下列一項動作作為附贈動作執行：疾走、撤離或躲藏。&Reference[Dash]、&Reference[Disengage]、&Reference[Hide].

Memorize Spell.name: Memorize Spell
Memorize Spell.description: Whenever you finish a Short Rest, you can study your spellbook and replace one of the level 1+ Wizard spells you have prepared for your Spellcasting feature with another level 1+ spell from the book.

phbmnkUnarmoredD.name: 無甲防禦
phbmnkUnarmoredD.description:
While you aren't wearing armor or wielding a Shield, your base Armor Class equals 10 plus your Dexterity and Wisdom modifiers.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which updates your Armor Class.

Nature's Sanctuary.description:
As a Magic action, you can expend a use of your Wild Shape and cause spectral trees and vines to appear in a 15-foot Cube on the ground within 120 feet of yourself. They last there for 1 minute or until you have the Incapacitated condition or die. You and your allies have Half Cover while in that area, and your allies gain the current Resistance of your Nature's Ward while there.

As a Bonus Action, you can move the Cube up to 60 feet to ground within 120 feet of yourself.

Foundry Note

This feature includes Active Effects for each Nature's Ward land type and adds the Half Cover status effect which automatically applies the relevant bonuses. Apply the relevant effect to your allies.

These Active Effects are not automatically added/removed to/from Actors in the designated area however.

It also includes an activity which can be used for tracking your Bonus Action usage when moving the spectral trees and vines.
Nature's Sanctuary.name: Nature's Sanctuary

Fleet Step.name: Fleet Step
Fleet Step.description: When you take a Bonus Action other than Step of the Wind, you can also use Step of the Wind immediately after that Bonus Action.

Two Extra Attacks.description: You can attack three times instead of once whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.
Two Extra Attacks.name: Two Extra Attacks

Heightened Spell.name: 升階法術
Heightened Spell.description:
消耗：2術法點

當你施放一道迫使生物進行豁免檢定的法術時，你可以消耗 2 術法點使該法術的其中一個目標在進行該法術的豁免檢定時具有劣勢。

Heightened Spell.name: 升階法術
Heightened Spell.condition: 當你施放一道迫使生物進行豁免檢定的法術時

Fiend Spells.name: 邪魔法術
Fiend Spells.description:
你宗主的魔法確保你始終準備特定的法術，當你達到邪魔法術表所提及的契術師等級時，你視為始終準備法術表上的法術。

邪魔法術
契術師等級法術
3@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplBurningHan]{燃燒之手}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplCommand000]{命令術}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplScorchingR]{灼熱射線}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplSuggestion]{暗示術}
5@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplFireball00]{火球術}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplStinkingCl]{臭雲術}
7@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplFireShield]{火焰護盾}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplWallofFire]{火牆術}
9@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplGeas000000]{指使術}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplInsectPlag]{疫病蟲群}

Foundry Note

As you level up these spells will be granted to you automatically.

Arcane Recovery.name: 奧術恢復
Arcane Recovery.description:
你可以通過研讀法術書來恢復一些魔法能量。當你完成一次短休時，你可以選擇已消耗的法術位來恢復。法術位的環階總和必須小於或等於你法師等級的一半（向上取整），且每個法術位都不能為6環或更高。舉例來說，若你是個4級法師，你可以恢復最多共計2個環階的法術位，可以恢復一個2環法術位，或恢復二個1環法術位。

一旦你使用此特性後，直到你完成一次長休前無法再次使用。

可用環階總和： [[(@classes.wizard.levels / 2)]]

Foundry Note

Since you can select the slots you will have to manually adjust your available slots. This feature can be used to track the one-time use though.

Aura of Devotion.name: Aura of Devotion
Aura of Devotion.description:
You and your allies have Immunity to the Charmed condition while in your Aura of Protection. If a Charmed ally enters the aura, that condition has no effect on that ally while there.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect for tracking characters impacted by your aura but does not automate the effects.

Master of Myriad Forms.description:
Prerequisite: Level 5+ Warlock

You can cast @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplAlterSelf0]{Alter Self} without expending a spell slot.

Foundry Note

This feature includes Alter Self's activities.

The Aquatic Adaptation, Change Appearance, and Natural Weapons activities include Active Effects for tracking your choice and require Concentration.

The Attack activities can be used for your attack/damage rolls when you choose the Natural Weapons option.

Aquatic Adaptation.description: You can breathe underwater and gain a Swim Speed equal to your Speed.
Aquatic Adaptation.name: Aquatic Adaptation

Natural Weapon.name: Natural Weapon
Natural Weapon.description: When you use your Unarmed Strike to deal damage with that new growth, it deals 1d6 damage of the type in parentheses instead of dealing the normal damage for your Unarmed Strike, and you use your spellcasting ability modifier for the attack and damage rolls rather than using Strength.

Master of Myriad Forms.name: Master of Myriad Forms

phbrgeWeaponMast.name: 武器精通
phbrgeWeaponMast.description:
你對武器的訓練使你能夠使用兩種你所選擇且擁有熟練的武器精通屬性，例如匕首與短弓。

每當你完成一次長休時，你可以更換你所選擇的武器種類，例如你可以改為使用彎刀和短劍的精通屬性。

Empowered Strikes.name: 真力注拳
Empowered Strikes.description:
每當你使用徒手打擊造成傷害時，你可以選擇造成力場傷害或其原本的傷害類型。

Foundry Note

The Empowered Strike activity on this feature can allows you to choose between Force and Bludgeoning damage in the roll dialog. It will remember your choice going forward.

It uses your Martial Arts Die (currently [[lookup @scale.monk.die]] for damage and will automatically update as you level up.

Divine Order: Thaumaturge.name: 神聖使命：奇術使
Divine Order: Thaumaturge.description:
你已將自己奉獻給下列的神聖使命：

【奇術使】你額外知曉一個 @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.SkHptN2PTzFGDaEj]{牧師法術列表}中的戲法。此外，你與神明的緊密聯繫使你的智力（奧秘或宗教）檢定獲得等同於感知調整值的加值（至少+1，當前 [[lookup @abilities.wis.mod]]）。

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which increases the number of cantrips you can know and grants the bonus to your Intelligence (Arcana or Religion) checks.

phbpdnWeaponMast.name: 武器精通
phbpdnWeaponMast.description:
你對武器的訓練使你能夠使用兩種你所選擇且擁有熟練的武器精通屬性，例如長劍與標槍。

每當你完成一次長休時，你可以更換你所選擇的武器種類，例如你可以改為使用斧槍和連枷的精通屬性。

Roving.name: Roving
Roving.description: Your Speed increases by 10 feet while you aren't wearing Heavy armor. You also have a Climb Speed and a Swim Speed equal to your Speed.

phbrgrWeaponMast.name: 武器精通
phbrgrWeaponMast.description:
你對武器的訓練使你能夠使用兩種你所選擇且擁有熟練的武器精通屬性，例如長弓與短弓。

每當你完成一次長休時，你可以更換你所選擇的武器種類，例如你可以改為使用彎刀和長劍的精通屬性。

Divine Order: Protector.name: 神聖使命：守護者
Divine Order: Protector.description:
你將自己獻身於下列神聖的使命：

【守護者】接受戰鬥訓練後，你獲得軍用武器熟練和重甲訓練。

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which grants the proficiency and training.

Radiant Strikes.description:
Your strikes now carry supernatural power. When you hit a target with an attack roll using a Melee weapon or an Unarmed Strike, the target takes an extra 1d8 Radiant damage.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which automatically adds the Radiant damage to all Damage Rolls made with your Melee Weapon Attacks and Unarmed Strikes.
Radiant Strikes.name: Radiant Strikes

Evocation Savant.name: 塑能學者
Evocation Savant.description:
從@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.6AnqLUowgdsqMFvz]{塑能學派}中選擇兩個不高於2環的法師法術（調整分組模式至「學派」以便於選擇），並將其免費抄入你的法術書。

此外，每當你在此職業獲得新環階的法術位時，你可以從塑能學派中選擇一個法師法術免費抄入你法術書。所選法術必須是你擁有的法術位環階。

phbrgeExpertise0.name: 專精
phbrgeExpertise0.description:
你獲得兩項你所選擇的已熟練技能的專精。推薦在擁有巧手與隱匿熟練時選擇他們。

在遊蕩者6級時，你再獲得兩項你所選擇的已熟練技能的專精。

Foundry Note

You will be prompted for your expertise choices as you level up.

Ascendant Step.name: 躍升步伐
Ascendant Step.description:
先決條件：契術師等級5以上

你可以不消耗任何法術位對自己施放@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplLevitate00]{浮空術}。

Levitating.name: Levitating
Levitating.description: The target can move only by pushing or pulling against a fixed object or surface within reach (such as a wall or a ceiling), which allows it to move as if it were climbing.

Jack of All Trades.name: 全能高手
Jack of All Trades.description:
你可以將你熟練加值的一半（向下取整）加入任何你尚未加入熟練加值的屬性檢定中。

舉例來說，若你進行力量（運動）檢定，且尚未熟練運動，你可以將熟練加值的一半加入檢定。

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which will automatically grant you half proficiency for all skills which you aren't currently proficient in.

phbftrEpicBoon00.name: 史詩恩惠
phbftrEpicBoon00.description: You gain an @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbFeats00000000.JournalEntryPage.GxfrwkJbrIvn7reC]{Epic Boon feat} or another feat of your choice for which you qualify. @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.feats.Item.phbBoonofCombatP]{Boon of Combat Prowess} is recommended.

Otherworldly Leap.name: 超凡跳躍
Otherworldly Leap.description:
先決條件：契術師等級2以上

你可以不消耗任何法術位對自己施放@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplJump000000]{跳躍術}

Foundry Note

This feature can be used in place of the Jump spell and includes an Active Effect for tracking.

Jump.name: Jump
Jump.description: Once on each of its turns until the spell ends, that creature can jump up to 30 feet by spending 10 feet of movement.

Instinctive Pounce.name: Instinctive Pounce
Instinctive Pounce.description: As part of the Bonus Action you take to enter your Rage, you can move up to half your Speed.

Dark One's Blessing.name: 黑暗者賜福
Dark One's Blessing.description: 當你將一個敵對生物的生命值歸零時，你獲得等同於你魅力調整值加上你契術師等級的臨時生命值（最少為1）。若其他人將一個距離你10呎內的敵對生物的生命值歸零時，你也會獲得此好處。

heal.condition: When you reduce an enemy to 0 Hit Points or  an enemy within 10 feet of you is reduced to 0 Hit Points

Deft Explorer.name: 熟練探險家
Deft Explorer.description:
得益於你的旅途，你獲得下列好處：

【專精】選擇一個你熟練但不具備專精的技能，你獲得該技能的專精。

【語言】你知曉兩種從第2章節的語言表中你所選擇的語言。

Foundry Note

You will be prompted for choices when you add the Ranger class to your character sheet.

Metamagic.name: 超魔法
Metamagic.description:
由於你的魔法源自體內流動，你可以修改你的法術以適應自己的需求。你獲得2個超魔法選項中你所選擇的超魔法選項。你使用你所選的超魔法來臨時改變你施放的法術。當使用一個超魔法選項時，你必須消耗其描述中需求的術法點。

當你施放法術時，你只能使用一次超魔法選項，除非超魔法選項中另有說明。

每當你獲得術士等級時，你可以將一個超魔法選項替換為一個你不知道的超魔法選項。當你的術士等級達到10和17時，你可以分別再獲得兩個超魔法選項。

Foundry Note

You will be prompted to choose Metamagic options as you level up.

Empowered Evocation.name: Empowered Evocation
Empowered Evocation.description:
Whenever you cast a Wizard spell from the Evocation school, you can add your Intelligence modifier to one damage roll of that spell.

Foundry Note

You can add your Intelligence modifier to the spell's Situational Bonus in the damage dialog or use this feature's Damage activity which allows you to select the type in the damage dialog.

damage.condition: Whenever you cast a Wizard spell from the Evocation school

One with Shadows.description:
Prerequisite: Level 5+ Warlock

While you're in an area of &Reference[Dim Light] or &Reference[Darkness], you can cast @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplInvisibili]{Invisibility} on yourself without expending a spell slot.

Foundry Note

The Cast activity can be used in place of the Invisibility spell and includes an Active Effect that sets the Invisible status effect.

Invisible.description: The spell ends early immediately after the target makes an attack roll, deals damage, or casts a spell.
Invisible.name: Invisible

One with Shadows.name: One with Shadows

Expertise.name: 專精
Expertise.description:
你在自己擁有熟練的技能中，任選兩項獲得專精。若你熟練表演與說服，建議選擇這兩項。

在你吟遊詩人9級時，你可以再任選兩項已熟練的技能獲得專精。

Scholar.name: 學者
Scholar.description: 學習法術之餘，你也在鑽研其他的學術領域。選擇下列一項你具有熟練的技能：奧秘、歷史、調查、醫藥、自然或宗教。你獲得所選技能的專精。

Slow Fall.name: 輕身墜
Slow Fall.description:
當你墜落時，你可以採取一個反應將任何你所受到的墜落傷害減少等同於你武僧等級五倍的數值。

Foundry Note

This feature includes a Reduce activity which can be used to restore lost Hit Points equal to five times your Monk level.

Misty Visions.name: 迷霧幻影
Misty Visions.description:
先決條件：契術師等級2以上

你可以不消耗法術位施放@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplSilentImag]{無聲幻影}。

Foundry Note

This feature includes Silent Image's activities and can be used in its place.

Eldritch Invocations.name: 魔能祈喚
Eldritch Invocations.description:
發掘禁忌的知識殘章賦予了你恆久的魔法能力。你獲得一個你所選擇的魔能祈喚，例如@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.classes.Item.phbinvPactTome00]。魔能祈喚在本職業後文的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbWarlock000000.JournalEntryPage.FA4hxx49eazhISIt]{魔能祈喚選項} 一節中描述。

【先決條件】若魔能祈喚有先決條件，則你必須滿足條件以習得該魔能祈喚。例如，若魔能祈喚需要你的契術師5級以上，那麼只有在你達到契術師5級後才可以選擇該祈喚。

【替換與獲得祈喚】每當你獲得契術師等級，你可以將一個祈喚替換為另一個符合條件的祈喚。若某個祈喚是你擁有的其他祈喚的先決條件，那麼你不能將其替換。

當你達到特定的契術師等級時，你將獲得更多你所選擇的祈喚，如契術師特性表中祈喚一欄所示。

當前最大魔能祈喚：[[lookup @scale.warlock.invocations-known]]

除非描述另有說明，否則你無法選擇同一祈喚。

Foundry Note

You will be prompted for your choices as you level up. The advancement system does not prevent you from taking any invocations so be sure that you meet the requirements before selecting one.

Devious Strikes: Dazed.name: Devious Strikes: Dazed
Devious Strikes: Dazed.description: On its next turn, the target can do only one of the following: move or take an action or a Bonus Action.

Devious Strikes: Knocked Out.description: The target has the Unconscious condition for 1 minute or until it takes any damage. The Unconscious target repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.
Devious Strikes: Knocked Out.name: Devious Strikes: Knocked Out

Devious Strikes: Blinded.description: The target has the Blinded condition until the end of its next turn
Devious Strikes: Blinded.name: Devious Strikes: Blinded

Daze.name: Daze
Daze.condition: When you deal Sneak Attack damage

Obscure.name: Obscure
Obscure.condition: When you deal Sneak Attack damage

Knock Out.condition: When you deal Sneak Attack damage
Knock Out.name: Knock Out

Devious Strikes.description:
You've practiced new ways to use your Sneak Attack deviously. The following effects are now among your Cunning Strike options.

Daze (Cost: 2d6). The target must succeed on a Constitution saving throw, or on its next turn, it can do only one of the following: move or take an action or a Bonus Action.

Knock Out (Cost: 6d6). The target must succeed on a Constitution saving throw, or it has the &Reference[Unconscious] condition for 1 minute or until it takes any damage. The Unconscious target repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

Obscure (Cost: 3d6). The target must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw, or it has the &Reference[Blinded] condition until the end of its next turn.

Foundry Note

After using Cunning Strike effects use the [[/item Cunning Strike activity=Cunning Sneak Attack]]{Cunning Sneak Attack} activity. It will prompt you to select how many dice you expended on effects and deduct them from your Sneak Attack roll automatically.

You can control the damage type in the damage roll dialog box.

The Daze activity includes an Active Effect for tracking the dazed target but it does not automate the effect.

The Knock Out activity includes an Active Effect which applies the Unconscious condition.

The Obscure activity includes an Active Effect which applies the Blinded condition.
Devious Strikes.name: Devious Strikes

Instill Vibrations.condition: When you hit a creature with an Unarmed Strike
Instill Vibrations.name: Instill Vibrations

End Vibrations.name: End Vibrations
End Vibrations.condition: When you take the Attack action on your turn

Quivering Palm.name: Quivering Palm
Quivering Palm.description:
You gain the ability to set up lethal vibrations in someone's body. When you hit a creature with an Unarmed Strike, you can expend 4 Focus Points to start these imperceptible vibrations, which last for a number of days equal to your Monk level. The vibrations are harmless unless you take an action to end them. Alternatively, when you take the Attack action on your turn, you can forgo one of the attacks to end the vibrations. To end them, you and the target must be on the same plane of existence. When you end them, the target must make a Constitution saving throw, taking 10d12 Force damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one.

You can have only one creature under the effect of this feature at a time. You can end the vibrations harmlessly (no action required).

Foundry Note

The Instill Vibrations activity expends 4 Focus Points and includes an Active Effect which can be used to track the target you have set up lethal vibrations in.

The End Vibrations activity includes the Saving Throw and Damage rolls.

Smite of Protection.name: Smite of Protection
Smite of Protection.description:
Your magical smite now radiates protective energy. Whenever you cast @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDivineSmit]{Divine Smite}, you and your allies have Half Cover while in your Aura of Protection. The aura has this benefit until the start of your next turn.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which provides the Half Cover status but it is not automatically granted as creatures enter/exit your aura.

Paladin's Smite.name: 聖騎士斬技
Paladin's Smite.description:
你始終準備@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplDivineSmit]{至聖斬}法術。此外，你可以不消耗法術位施放該法術，一旦這麼做，你必須完成一次長休才能再次施放。

Foundry Note

When you reach this level the Divine Smite spell is added to your spells as Always Prepared and with a free use.

phbclcSpellcasti.name: 施法
phbclcSpellcasti.description:
你透過祈禱和冥想習得了施法。有關施法的規則請參見@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.mh3akteBDiLegqFK]{第7章}。以下資訊詳細說明了如何將這些規則與牧師法術結合使用。牧師法術即該職業描述後的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.SkHptN2PTzFGDaEj]{牧師法術列表}中羅列的法術。

【戲法】你知曉三個牧師法術列中你所選擇的戲法。推薦選擇@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplGuidance00]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplSacredFlam]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplThaumaturg]。

每當你獲得牧師等級時，你可以將一個戲法替換為另一個牧師法術列表中你所選擇的戲法。

當你達到牧師4級和10級時，你可以從牧師法術列表中習得另一個戲法，如@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbCleric0000000.JournalEntryPage.acPyA6A4DQBSnuZB#class-features]{牧師特性}表中戲法一欄所示。

【法術位】牧師特性表記錄了你有多少法術位以施放1環以上的法術。當你完成長休時，你會重獲所有消耗的法術位。

【準備1環以上的法術】通過此特性施法前，你需要準備數個可用的1環以上法術所構成的準備列表。首先，從牧師法術列表中選擇4個1環法術。推薦選擇@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplBless00000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplCureWounds]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplGuidingBol]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplShieldofFa]。

你的準備列表上的法術數量將隨著牧師等級而增加，如牧師特性表中準備法術一欄所示。每當該數量增加時，選擇額外的牧師法術來添加到你的準備列表中，直到你準備列表上的法術數量與牧師特性表中的數量相匹配。所選法術的環階必須是你擁有的法術位。例如，作為3級牧師，你的準備法術列表應該包括六個任意組合的1環或2環術士法術。

若其他牧師特性給予你始終準備的法術，則這些法術不會計入你在此特性中的準備法術數量，但是這些法術對你而言仍視為牧師法術。

【更換準備法術】每當你完成長休時，你可以更換準備法術列表，將任意法術替換為其他你擁有法術位的牧師法術。

【施法屬性】感知是你施放牧師法術的施法屬性。

【施法法器】你可以使用聖徽作為牧師法術的施法法器。

Unarmored Defense.name: 無甲防禦
Unarmored Defense.description: 當你未穿戴任何護甲時，你的護甲等級（AC）等同於10 + 你的敏捷調整值 + 你的感知調整值。你使用盾牌仍可以獲得此好處。

Epic Boon.name: 史詩恩惠
Epic Boon.description:
You gain an @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbFeats00000000.JournalEntryPage.GxfrwkJbrIvn7reC]{Epic Boon feat} or another feat of your choice for which you qualify. @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.feats.Item.phbBoonofSpellRe]{Boon of Spell Recall} is recommended.

Foundry Note

You will be prompted for a choice while leveling up.

Overchannel.name: Overchannel

Second+ Use.name: Second+ Use
Second+ Use.condition: When you cast a Wizard spell with a spell slot of levels 1-5 that deals damage

First Use.condition: When you cast a Wizard spell with a spell slot of levels 1-5 that deals damage
First Use.name: First Use

Overchannel.description:
You can increase the power of your spells. When you cast a Wizard spell with a spell slot of levels 1–5 that deals damage, you can deal maximum damage with that spell on the turn you cast it.

The first time you do so, you suffer no adverse effect. If you use this feature again before you finish a Long Rest, you take 2d12 Necrotic damage for each level of the spell slot immediately after you cast it. This damage ignores Resistance and Immunity.

Each time you use this feature again before finishing a Long Rest, the Necrotic damage per spell level increases by 1d12.

Foundry Note

This feature has Limited Uses to track how many times it has been used to automate the damage.

The First Use activity includes one free activity use and restores all uses of the feature.

The Second+ Use activity consumes a use and increases the damage automatically and should be used for all subsequent uses until you finish a Long Rest.

Agonizing Blast.name: 痛苦衝擊
Agonizing Blast.description:
先決條件：契術師等級2以上，具有可造成傷害的契術師戲法

選擇一個你知曉可以造成傷害的契術師戲法，你可以將你的魅力調整值加到該法術的傷害骰上。

【可複選】你可以重複選擇此祈喚，但每次你都必須選擇不同且符合條件的戲法。

Foundry Note

The change to your cantrip will have to be made manually by adding "@abilties.cha.mod" to the "Bonus" field of your spell's damage.

Eldritch Spear.name: 魔能之矛
Eldritch Spear.description:
先決條件：契術師等級2以上，具有可造成傷害的契術師戲法

選擇一個你知曉可以造成傷害且範圍10呎以上的契術師戲法。當你施放該法數時，其範圍增加等同於你契術師等級的30倍。

【可複選】你可以重複選擇此祈喚，但每次你都必須選擇不同且符合條件的戲法。

Foundry Note

Use the Increase Range enchantment activity and drag your chosen cantrip to the chat card to increase its range and append ", Eldritch Spear" for easier identification.

phbclcEpicBoon00.name: 史詩恩惠
phbclcEpicBoon00.description: You gain an @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbFeats00000000.JournalEntryPage.GxfrwkJbrIvn7reC]{Epic Boon feat} or another feat of your choice for which you qualify. @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.feats.Item.phbBoonofFate000]{Boon of Fate} is recommended.

Fiendish Vigor.name: 邪魔精力
Fiendish Vigor.description:
先決條件：契術師等級2以上

你可以不消耗任何法術位對自己施放@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplFalseLife0]{摹造生命}。當你以此特性施放法術時，你不用為臨時生命值擲骰，而是將每個骰子自動取滿。

Foundry Note

The False Life activity provides a healing roll that includes the maximum die roll and the additional Hit Points for being cast at a higher level based on your current Pact Magic Level.

Wild Companion.name: 荒野夥伴
Wild Companion.description:
你可以召喚一個具有動物外形的自然精魂來幫助你。作為魔法動作，你可以消耗一個法術位或荒野形態次數來施放一次無需材料構材的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplFindFamili]法術。

當你以此方式施放法術，魔寵的生物類型為精類，並會在你完成長休時消失。

Foundry Note

This feature includes a Summon activity which can be used to summon your wild companion. You can choose whether to expend a use of wild shape or a spell slot when activating it.

The summon does not automatically disappear when you finish a Long Rest.

Superior Critical.name: Superior Critical
Superior Critical.description:
Your attack rolls with weapons and Unarmed Strikes can now score a Critical Hit on a roll of 18–20 on the d20.

Foundry Note

This feature automatically increases the Critical Hit threshold to 18.

Slippery Mind.name: Slippery Mind
Slippery Mind.description:
Your cunning mind is exceptionally difficult to control. You gain proficiency in Wisdom and Charisma saving throws.

Foundry Note

These proficiencies are granted automatically as you level up.

Paladin.name: 聖騎士
Paladin.description:
立下神聖誓言的虔誠戰士

核心聖騎士特徵

關鍵屬性

力量和魅力

生命骰

每聖騎士等級D10

豁免熟練

感知與魅力

技能熟練

從運動、洞悉、威嚇、醫藥、遊說、宗教中選擇2項

武器熟練

簡易和軍用武器

護甲訓練

輕甲、中甲、重甲、盾牌

起始裝備

選擇A或B： (A) @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbarmChainMail0]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbarmShield0000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepLongsword0]、6把@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepJavelin000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagHolySymbolV]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagPriestsPack]、[[/award 9GP]]；(B) [[/award 150GP]]

聖騎士們在各自誓言的驅使下團結一致對抗邪惡勢力。他們也許是在神壇前由祭司見證宣誓，或在林中聖地向自然精魄許下承諾，又或是面臨絕望與災難卻只在死者的見證下立約，所有這些聖騎士誓言都是極強的契約。也正是誓言的偉力才讓一名虔誠的戰士化作身負祝福的勇者。

聖騎士經年累月苦練戰鬥技藝，並精通各種武器與護甲。即便如此，其武力的重要性也僅次於其行使的魔法力量。他們以之治療傷患，斬殺妄邪，守護清白者和所有為公義而戰的同伴。

聖騎士的存在本身即決定了其為冒險而生，這種生活會一直持續直至傷重無法繼續，否則他們總是會站在宇宙善惡大戰的最前線，與邪惡殊死搏鬥。在俗世中，真正能受到感召成為聖騎士的人，遠比民兵團或正規軍中可謂之戰士者要更為罕見。而這些勇士們受到感召時，都將放棄所擁有的身份地位，義無反顧投入與邪惡對抗的戰鬥之中。

成為聖騎士…

作為首級角色

  • 獲得聖騎士核心特徵表中的所有特徵。
  • 獲得聖騎士特性表中列出的1級特性。

作為兼職角色

  • 獲得下列聖騎士核心特徵表中的特徵：生命骰，軍用武器熟練，以及輕甲、中甲和盾牌訓練
  • 獲得聖騎士特性表中列出的1級特性。請參閱第 2 章的兼職規則來確定可用的法術位。

打破誓言

聖騎士堅持著最高的道德行為標準，但即使最虔誠的人也會犯錯。聖騎士有時也會違背誓言。

違背誓言的聖騎士常會通宵守夜或禁戒飲食，以這種方式進行懺悔。在寬恕儀式之後，聖騎士將重新啟程。

若你的聖騎士對違背誓言並無悔意，那麼請與你的 DM 討論。你的聖騎士也許應該選擇更合適的子職業，甚至放棄該職業去選用另一個職業。

Witch Sight.name: Witch Sight
Witch Sight.description:
Prerequisite: Level 15+ Warlock

You have Truesight with a range of 30 feet.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which automatically grants you Truesight.

phbrgrEpicBoon00.name: 史詩恩惠
phbrgrEpicBoon00.description:
You gain an @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbFeats00000000.JournalEntryPage.GxfrwkJbrIvn7reC]{Epic Boon feat} or another feat of your choice for which you qualify. @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.feats.Item.phbBoonofDimensi]{Boon of Dimensional Travel} is recommended.

Foundry Note

You will be prompted for a choice while leveling up.

Improved Blessed Strikes.description:
The option you chose for Blessed Strikes grows more powerful.

Divine Strike. The extra damage of your Divine Strike increases to 2d8.

Potent Spellcasting. When you cast a Cleric cantrip and deal damage to a creature with it, you can give vitality to yourself or another creature within 60 feet of yourself, granting a number of Temporary Hit Points equal to twice your Wisdom modifier.

Foundry Note

If you chose Divine Strike the damage is automatically increased. If you chose Potent Spellcasting you can use the Potent Spellcasting activity on this feature.

Potent Spellcasting: Heal.name: Potent Spellcasting: Heal
Potent Spellcasting: Heal.condition: When you cast a Cleric cantrip and deal damage to a creature with it

Improved Blessed Strikes.name: Improved Blessed Strikes

Primal Order: Magician.name: 原初誓約：巫祝
Primal Order: Magician.description:
額外知曉一個從@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.LhvuDQEyrCdg5EfU#cantrip]{德魯伊法術列表}中選擇的戲法。此外，你與自然的緊密聯繫使你的智力（奧秘或自然）檢定獲得等同於感知調整值的加值（至少+1，當前感知調整值：[[lookup @abilities.wis.mod]]）。

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which automates the increase to your known cantrips and the bonus to your Arcane and Nature checks.

Fighter.name: 戰士
Fighter.description:
十八般武藝樣樣精通的能手

核心戰士特徵

關鍵屬性

力量和敏捷

生命骰

每戰士等級D10

豁免熟練

力量與體質

技能熟練

從特技、馴獸、運動、歷史、洞悉、威嚇、遊說、察覺或求生中選擇兩項

武器熟練

簡易武器和軍用武器

護甲訓練

輕甲、中甲、重甲、盾牌

起始裝備

選擇A或B或C： (A) @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbarmChainMail0]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepGreatsword]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepFlail00000]、8把@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepJavelin000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagDungeoneers]、[[/award 4GP]]；(B) @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbarmStuddedLea]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepScimitar00]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepShortsword]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepLongbow000]、20支@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbamoArrows0000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagQuiver00000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagDungeoneers]、[[/award 11GP]]；(C) [[/award 155GP]]

戰士往往馳騁於戰場。戰士可以是探險騎士，皇家鬥士，精英士兵或是老練傭兵，他們熟習各種武器與護甲，他們的生活與死亡相伴，既不害怕手上染滿鮮血，也不畏懼迎接死亡。

戰士精通各種武器技藝，裝備精良的戰士總能在任何戰鬥中找到合適的武器。同樣，戰士對於各種盔甲也駕輕就熟。除掌握基本使用技巧外，每位戰士還專精於某種特定的戰鬥風格。有些專攻箭術，有些專精雙持武器戰鬥，有些則擅長於用魔法增強自己的戰鬥能力。泛用與專精相結合，讓戰士無往而不利。

成為戰士…

作為首級角色

  • 獲得戰士核心特徵表中的所有特徵。
  • 獲得戰士特性表中列出的1級特性。

作為兼職角色

  • 獲得下列戰士核心特徵表中的特徵：生命骰，軍用武器熟練，以及輕甲和盾牌的訓練。
  • 獲得戰士特性表中列出的1級特性。

Steady Aim.name: 守穩就準
Steady Aim.description: 作為附贈動作，你在當前回合為你的下次攻擊檢定提供優勢。你只有在此回合尚未移動過時才能使用此特性，並且你的速度將在你使用後變為0直到當前回合結束。

Acrobatic Movement.name: 飛簷走壁
Acrobatic Movement.description: 當你未穿戴護甲或握持盾牌時，你獲得在垂直表面移動，以及在你的回合中移動時橫越水面不會下沉的能力。

Abjure Foes.name: 棄絕眾敵
Abjure Foes.description:
As a Magic action, you can expend one use of this class’s Channel Divinity to overwhelm foes with awe. As you present your Holy Symbol or weapon, you can target a number of creatures equal to your Charisma modifier (minimum of one creature) that you can see within 60 feet of yourself. Each target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or have the &Reference[Frightened] condition for 1 minute or until it takes any damage. While Frightened in this way, a target can do only one of the following on its turns: move, take an action, or take a Bonus Action.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which applies the Frightened condition.

Tactical Shift.name: Tactical Shift
Tactical Shift.description: Whenever you activate your Second Wind with a Bonus Action, you can move up to half your Speed without provoking Opportunity Attacks.

Hurl Through Hell.name: Hurl Through Hell
Hurl Through Hell.condition: Once per turn when you hit a creature with an attack roll

Hurl Through Hell.name: Hurl Through Hell
Hurl Through Hell.description:
Once per turn when you hit a creature with an attack roll, you can try to instantly transport the target through the Lower Planes. The target must succeed on a Charisma saving throw against your spell save DC, or the target disappears and hurtles through a nightmare landscape. The target takes 8d10 Psychic damage if it isn't a Fiend, and it has the &Reference[Incapacitated] condition until the end of your next turn, when it returns to the space it previously occupied or the nearest unoccupied space.

Once you use this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a Long Rest unless you expend a Pact Magic spell slot (no action required) to restore your use of it.

Foundry Note

This feature includes one limited use.

The Regain Use activity will expend a Pact Magic spell slot and restore a use of this feature.

Recover Spell Slots.condition: When you finish a Short Rest
Recover Spell Slots.name: Recover Spell Slots

Natural Recovery.name: Natural Recovery
Natural Recovery.description:
You can cast one of the level 1+ spells that you have prepared from your Circle Spells feature without expending a spell slot, and you must finish a Long Rest before you do so again.

In addition, when you finish a Short Rest, you can choose expended spell slots to recover. The spell slots can have a combined level that is equal to or less than half your Druid level (round up, currently [[lookup @classes.druid.levels]]), and none of them can be level 6+. For example, if you're a level 6 Druid, you can recover up to three levels' worth of spell slots. You can recover a level 3 spell slot, a level 2 and a level 1 spell slot, or three level 1 spell slots. Once you recover spell slots with this feature, you can't do so again until you finish a Long Rest.

Foundry Note

The Cast Spell activity can be used to track its single free use.

The Recover Spell Slot activity does not automate the restoration of spell slots but can be used for tracking its own single use.

Blessed Strikes.description:
Divine power infuses you in battle. You gain one of the following options of your choice (if you get either option from a Cleric subclass in an older book, use only the option you choose for this feature).

Divine Strike. Once on each of your turns when you hit a creature with an attack roll using a weapon, you can cause the target to take an extra 1d8 Necrotic or Radiant damage (your choice).

Potent Spellcasting. Add your Wisdom modifier to the damage you deal with any Cleric cantrip.

Foundry Note

During advancement you will be able to choose which option you prefer.
Blessed Strikes.name: Blessed Strikes

Sacred Weapon.name: Sacred Weapon
Sacred Weapon.description:
When you take the Attack action, you can expend one use of your Channel Divinity to imbue one Melee weapon that you are holding with positive energy. For 10 minutes or until you use this feature again, you add your Charisma modifier to attack rolls you make with that weapon (minimum bonus of +1), and each time you hit with it, you cause it to deal its normal damage type or Radiant damage.

The weapon also emits Bright Light in a 20-foot radius and Dim Light 20 feet beyond that.

You can end this effect early (no action required). This effect also ends if you aren't carrying the weapon.

Hunter.name: 獵人
Hunter.description:
守護自然與眾生不被摧毀

你在荒野和別處追蹤獵物，運用作為獵人的屬性守護自然和各地的人類遠離摧毀力量。

Feral Senses.name: Feral Senses
Feral Senses.description:
Your connection to the forces of nature grants you Blindsight with a range of 30 feet.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which upgrades your Blindsight to 30 feet if you do not already have it.

Persistent Rage.description:
When you roll Initiative, you can regain all expended uses of Rage. After you regain uses of Rage in this way, you can't do so again until you finish a Long Rest.

In addition, your Rage is so fierce that it now lasts for 10 minutes without you needing to do anything to extend it from round to round. Your Rage ends early if you have the &Reference[Unconscious] condition (not just the &Reference[Incapacitated] condition) or don Heavy armor.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an activity which can be used when you roll Initiative which will recharge all of your Rage uses.
Persistent Rage.name: Persistent Rage

Mindless Rage.description:
You have Immunity to the &Reference[Charmed] and &Reference[Frightened] conditions while your Rage is active. If you're Charmed or Frightened when you enter your Rage, the condition ends on you.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which grants the Charmed and Frightened condition immunity. It is not applied automatically when you begin your Rage though.
Mindless Rage.name: Mindless Rage

Nature's Ward.description:
You are immune to the Poisoned condition, and you have Resistance to a damage type associated with your current land choice in the Circle Spells feature, as shown in the Nature's Ward table.

Nature's Ward
Land TypeResistance
AridFire
PolarCold
TemperateLightning
TropicalPoison

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect for the Poison condition immunity and an Active Effect for each land type. You can activate the Active Effect for your chosen land type.
Nature's Ward.name: Nature's Ward

phbscrSpellcasti.name: 施法
phbscrSpellcasti.description:
借助你的天生魔力，你可以施放法術。參見 @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.mh3akteBDiLegqFK]{施法規則}。以下資訊詳細說明了如何將這些規則與術士法術結合使用。術士法術即該職業描述後的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.VfZ5mH2ZuyFq82Ga]{術士法術列表}中羅列的法術。

【戲法】你知曉四個你所選擇的術士戲法。推薦選擇@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplLight00000]、 @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplPrestidigi]、 @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplShockingGr]、 @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplSorcerousB]。每當你獲得術士等級時，你可以將一個從特性所獲得的戲法替換為另一個你所選擇的術士戲法。

當你達到術士4級和10級時，你習得另一個你所選擇的術士戲法，如術士特性表中戲法一欄所示。

【法術位】@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSorcerer00000.JournalEntryPage.fsqRUA4acVXH4I3O#class-features]{術士特性表}記錄了你有多少法術位以施放1環以上的法術。當你完成長休時，你會重獲所有消耗的法術位。

【準備1環以上的法術】通過此特性施法前，你需要準備數個可用的1環以上法術所構成的準備列表。首先，選擇兩個1環術士法術。推薦選擇 燃燒之手與偵測魔法。

你的準備列表上的法術數量將隨著術士等級而增加，如術士特性表中準備法術一欄所示。每當該數量增加時，選擇額外的術士法術來添加到你的準備列表中，直到你準備列表上的法術數量與術士特性表中的數量相匹配。所選法術的環階必須是你擁有的法術位。例如，作為3級術士，你的準備法術列表應該包括六個任意組合的1環或2環術士法術。

若其他術士特性給予你始終準備的法術，則這些法術不會計入你在此特性中的準備法術數量，但是這些法術對你而言仍視為術士法術。

【更換你的準備法術】每當你獲得術士等級時，你可以將準備列表中的一個法術，替換為另一個你擁有法術位的術士法術。

【施法屬性】 魅力是你施放術士法術的施法屬性。

【施法法器】你可以使用奧術法器作為術士法術的施法法器。

Divine Intervention.name: Divine Intervention
Divine Intervention.description:
You can call on your deity or pantheon to intervene on your behalf. As a Magic action, choose any @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.SkHptN2PTzFGDaEj]{Cleric spell} of level 5 or lower that doesn't require a Reaction to cast. As part of the same action, you cast that spell without expending a spell slot or needing Material components. You can't use this feature again until you finish a Long Rest.

Foundry Note

Uncheck the "Consumption" box when casting the spell for the free use. This feature can be used to track available uses.

Signature.description: Choose two level 3 spells in your spellbook as your signature spells. You always have these spells prepared, and you can cast each of them once at level 3 without expending a spell slot. When you do so, you can’t cast them in this way again until you finish a Short or Long Rest. To cast either spell at a higher level, you must expend a spell slot.
Signature.name: Signature

Signature Spells.description:
Choose two level 3 spells in your spellbook as your signature spells. You always have these spells prepared, and you can cast each of them once at level 3 without expending a spell slot. When you do so, you can't cast them in this way again until you finish a Short or Long Rest. To cast either spell at a higher level, you must expend a spell slot.

Foundry Note

The Make Signature activity can be used to enchant two spells which marks them as "Always Prepared" and adds ", Signature" to their title for easy identification.

The Expend First Spell and Expend Second Spell activities can be used for tracking your free use of each spell and refresh on a Short and Long Rest.
Signature Spells.name: Signature Spells

Primal Knowledge.name: 原初知識
Primal Knowledge.description:
你獲得1級野蠻人級能列表上可用的另一項技能熟練。

此外，在你啟用狂暴時，你在嘗試完成特定任務時可以引導原初之力。每當你使用下列其中一項技能進行能力檢定時，即時其通常使用不同屬性，你可以使其作為力量檢定：特技、威嚇、察覺、隱匿、生存。當你使用此能力時，你的力量表現出流淌於你體內的原始之力，它強化了你的敏捷、氣勢與感官。

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which will cause those skills to automatically use your Strength modifier if it is higher than the normal Ability Score associated with the Skill.

phbscrEpicBoon00.name: 史詩恩惠
phbscrEpicBoon00.description:
You gain an @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbFeats00000000.JournalEntryPage.GxfrwkJbrIvn7reC]{Epic Boon} feat or another feat of your choice for which you qualify. @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.feats.Item.phbBoonofDimensi]{Boon of Dimensional Travel} is recommended.

Foundry Note

You will be prompted for a choice while leveling up.

Thief's Reflexes.name: 竊賊反射
Thief's Reflexes.description: You are adept at laying ambushes and quickly escaping danger. You can take two turns during the first round of any combat. You take your first turn at your normal Initiative and your second turn at your Initiative minus 10.

Restoring Touch.description:
When you use Lay On Hands on a creature, you can also remove one or more of the following conditions from the creature: Blinded, Charmed, Deafened, Frightened, Paralyzed, or Stunned. You must expend 5 Hit Points from the healing pool of Lay On Hands for each of these conditions you remove; those points don't also restore Hit Points to the creature.

Foundry Note

This feature includes a Scale prompt for selecting how many conditions you would like to remove that will automatically consume the correct number from your Lay on Hands pool.
Restoring Touch.name: Restoring Touch

Additional Fighting Style.name: 額外戰鬥風格
Additional Fighting Style.description: 你獲得其他你選擇的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbFeats00000000.JournalEntryPage.sbHImaCB8ZMEHYkb]{戰鬥風格專長}

Eldritch Master.description:
When you use your Magical Cunning feature, you regain all your expended Pact Magic spell slots.

Foundry Note

Use this feature to restore all expended Pact Magic spell slots. It will consume the free use from your Magical Cunning feature.
Eldritch Master.name: Eldritch Master

Rogue.description: An NPC of the DM’s choice becomes Hostile toward you. You don’t know the identity of this NPC until they or someone else reveals it. Nothing less than a Wish spell or divine intervention can end the NPC’s hostility toward you.

Rogue Card: Hostility.name: Rogue Card: Hostility
Rogue Card: Hostility.description:
Source: @UUID[Compendium.dnd-dungeon-masters-guide.equipment.Item.dmgDmtRogue00000]{Rogue}

An NPC (unknown identity) is Hostile towards you.

Card Effect.condition: Card's effect occurs immediately upon draw
Card Effect.name: Card Effect

Rogue.name: 遊蕩者

Supreme Healing.description:
When you would normally roll one or more dice to restore Hit Points to a creature with a spell or Channel Divinity, don't roll those dice for the healing; instead use the highest number possible for each die. For example, instead of restoring 2d6 Hit Points to a creature with a spell, you restore 12.

Foundry Note

This feature does not automate the maximizing of all of your rolls.
Supreme Healing.name: Supreme Healing

Protect.name: Protect
Protect.condition: When any creature whose name is on the page is reduced to 0 Hit Points but not killed outright

Gift of the Protectors.description:
Prerequisite: Level 9+ Warlock, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.classes24.Item.phbinvPactTome00]{Pact of the Tome} Invocation

A new page appears in your @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.items.Item.CwWbeQ6XyqFzbMYw]{Book of Shadows} when you conjure it. With your permission, a creature can take an action to write its name on that page, which can contain a number of names equal to your Charisma modifier (minimum of one name).

When any creature whose name is on the page is reduced to 0 Hit Points but not killed outright, the creature magically drops to 1 Hit Point instead. Once this magic is triggered, no creature can benefit from it until you finish a Long Rest.

As a Magic action, you can erase a name on the page by touching it.

Foundry Note

The Protect activity consumes a use of its activity which refreshes every Long Rest.

The Write Name activity consumes a use of the item which can be used for tracking how many names you've written down.

The Erase Name activity will restore a use of the item and allows you to add another name.
Gift of the Protectors.name: Gift of the Protectors

Sorcerer.name: 術士
Sorcerer.description:
魔力與生俱來的耀眼巫師

術士核心特徵

關鍵屬性

魅力

生命骰

每術士等級D6

豁免熟練

體質與魅力

技能熟練

從奧秘、欺瞞、洞悉、威嚇、遊說、宗教中選擇兩項

武器熟練

簡易武器

護甲訓練

無

起始裝備

選擇A或B： (A) @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepSpear00000]、2 @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepDagger0000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagArcaneFocus] (@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbafcCrystal000])、 @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagDungeoneers]、[[/award 28GP]]；(B) [[/award 50GP]]

術士的魔法力量與生俱來，這種魔力已經融進了他們的血脈裡。有些術士已經說不清他們力量起源究竟是什麼，而另一些術士認為自己的力量來自於他或是家族的某些奇遇。出生時受到龍或樹靈的祝福，又或者萬里無雲降閃電，這些事情都有可能激起術法天賦的火苗。除此之外，神明的恩賜、暴露在另一個位面的怪誕魔法下，又或是一窺現實世界的內裡，都有可能賜予術士力量。不論這股力量起源如何，所造成的結果已然成為術士身上不可磨滅的印記，那便是這世代傳承的湧動魔力。

術士無需學習魔法，這原始而沸騰的魔力本就是他們的一部分。但他們仍需要精進駕馭引導天生魔力的技巧，以此來尋獲更高效，更強力的方式去釋放他們的力量。隨著術士得以掌控與生俱來的魔力，他們與自己的術法起源也越來越協調，最終展現出與之來源相呼應的獨特力量。

術士十分罕見。有些家族每一代只會出現一個術士，不多也不少。不過多數時候，術法天賦的出現純屬偶然。擁有這股魔法的人將很快發現，力量不喜歡沉默。它渴望被運用。

成為一位術士 …

作為首級角色

  • 獲得術士核心特徵表中所有特徵。
  • 獲得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSorcerer00000.JournalEntryPage.fsqRUA4acVXH4I3O#class-features]{術士特性表}中列出的 1 級特性。

作為兼職角色

  • 獲得術士核心特徵表中的生命骰。
  • 獲得術士特性表中列出的 1 級特性。參見@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbCreatingAChar.JournalEntryPage.vcs4jfEKRxPCsgXm]{兼職規則}以決定你所能使用的法術槽。

Metamagic.title: 超魔法
Metamagic.hint: 因為你的魔力由體內流動，因此你可以扭曲所施放的法術使其符合你的需求。你獲得兩項超魔法選項。

Preserve Life.name: Preserve Life
Preserve Life.description:
As a Magic action, you present your Holy Symbol and expend a use of your Channel Divinity to evoke healing energy that can restore a number of Hit Points equal to five times your Cleric level. Choose &Reference[Bloodied] creatures within 30 feet of yourself (which can include you), and divide those Hit Points among them. This feature can restore a creature to no more than half its Hit Point maximum.

Foundry Note

The Heal activity does not automatically restrict the HP gained to 50% of the target's max.

Perfect Focus.name: 心無旁騖
Perfect Focus.description:
When you roll Initiative and don't use Uncanny Metabolism, you regain expended Focus Points until you have 4 if you have 3 or fewer.

Foundry Note

This feature does not automatically regain the expended Focus Points.

Spellcasting.name: 施法
Spellcasting.description:
你透過鑽研詩人技藝而學會了施法。有關施法的規則請參見@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.mh3akteBDiLegqFK]{chapter 7} 。以下資訊詳細說明了如何將這些規則與吟遊詩人法術結合使用。吟遊詩人法術即該職業描述後的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.wwia6Wwo4BgE9GSI]{吟遊詩人法術列表}中羅列的法術。

【戲法】你知曉兩個從吟遊詩人法術列表中你所選擇的戲法。推薦選擇@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplDancingLig]和@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplViciousMoc] 。

每當你獲得吟遊詩人等級時，你可以將一個戲法替換為另一個吟遊詩人法術列表中你所選擇的戲法。

當你達到吟遊詩人 4 級和 10 級時，你可以從吟遊詩人法術列表中學習一個新的戲法，正如@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbBard000000000.JournalEntryPage.V8pqIWlaL9GhY61t#class-features]{吟遊詩人特性}表中戲法一欄所示。

【法術位】吟遊詩人特性表記錄了你有多少法術位用以施放 1+環階的法術。當你完成長休時，你會重獲所有消耗的法術位。

【準備1環以上的法術】通過該特性施法前，你需要選擇數個可用的1環以上的法術構成準備列表。首先，從吟遊詩人法術列表中選擇四個 1 環法術。推薦選擇@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplCharmPerso]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplColorSpray]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplDissonantW]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplHealingWor]。

準備列表上的法術數量將隨著你的吟遊詩人等級而增加，正如吟遊詩人特性表中準備法術一欄所示。每當該數量增加時，從吟遊詩人法術列表中選擇額外的法術來新增到你的準備列表中，直到你準備列表上的法術數量與吟遊詩人特性表中的數量相匹配。你只能準備已經獲得相應環階法術位的法術。例如，作為 3 級吟遊詩人，你的準備法術列表應該包括六個任意組合的1環或2環法術。

若另一個吟遊詩人特性給予你額外的準備法術，這些法術不會計入你在該特性中的準備法術數量，但是這些法術對你而言仍算作吟遊詩人法術。

【更改準備法術】每當你獲得一個吟遊詩人等級時， 你可以將準備列表中的一個法術，替換為另一個你擁有法術位的吟遊詩人法術。

【施法屬性】魅力是你施放吟遊詩人法術的施法屬性。

【師法法器】你可以使用樂器作為吟遊詩人法術的施法法器。

Use Magic Device.description:
You've learned how to maximize use of magic items, granting you the following benefits.

Attunement. You can attune to up to four magic items at once.

Charges. Whenever you use a magic item property that expends charges, roll [[/r 1d6]]. On a roll of 6, you use the property without expending the charges.

Scrolls. You can use any Spell Scroll, using Intelligence as your spellcasting ability for the spell. If the spell is a cantrip or a level 1 spell, you can cast it reliably. If the scroll contains a higher-level spell, you must first succeed on an [[/skill arc]] check (DC 10 plus the spell's level). On a successful check, you cast the spell from the scroll. On a failed check, the scroll disintegrates.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect that automatically increases your attunement maximum.

When using an item property that expends charges roll the d6 and uncheck the consumption box to use it for free.

Attunement Bonus.description: The Use Magic Device feature allows you to attune to up to four magic items at once.
