Attunement Bonus.name: Attunement Bonus

Use Magic Device.name: Use Magic Device

Primal Order: Warden.name: 原初誓約：衛士
Primal Order: Warden.description:
>接受戰鬥訓練後，你獲得軍用武器的熟練，並接受了中甲訓練。

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which automates the addition of your Martial weapons proficiency and Medium armor training.

Careful Spell.name: 謹慎法術
Careful Spell.description:
消耗1法術點

當你施放一個會強迫其他生物進行豁免檢定的法術時，你可以保護其中一些生物不受該法術的完整威力影響。要這麼做，消耗1點術法點，並選擇最多等同於你魅力調整值數量的生物（最少一個生物）。被選擇的生物將在對抗該法術的豁免檢定中自動成功，並且若該法術在豁免成功時會造成一半傷害，則不會受到任何傷害。

你能保護的生物： [[lookup @abilities.cha.mod]]

Careful Spell.name: 謹慎法術
Careful Spell.condition: 當你施放一個會強迫其他生物進行豁免檢定的法術時

Remarkable Athlete.description:
Thanks to your athleticism, you have Advantage on Initiative rolls and Strength (Athletics) checks.

In addition, immediately after you score a Critical Hit, you can move up to half your Speed without provoking Opportunity Attacks.

Foundry Note

This feature automatically grants Advantage on Initiative rolls.
Remarkable Athlete.name: Remarkable Athlete

Transmuted Spell.name: 轉化法術
Transmuted Spell.description:
消耗：1術法點

當你施放造成以下某種類型傷害的法術時，你可以消耗 1 術法點將法術的傷害類型轉換為其中另一種傷害類型：強酸、寒冷、火焰、閃電、毒素、雷鳴。

Transmuted Spell.name: 轉化法術
Transmuted Spell.condition: 當你施放造成強酸、寒冷、火焰、閃電、毒素或雷鳴傷害的法術時

Wild Shape.name: 荒野形態
Wild Shape.description:
自然之力使你能夠變身為動物形態。作為附贈動作，你可以變形為此特性中已習得的野獸形態（見下文「已知形態」）。你可以保持變形的時間等同於你德魯伊等級一半的小時（當前[[lookup @classes.druid.levels]]級）或者直到你再次使用荒野形態、或是陷入無力狀態、抑或死亡時，變形提前終止。你也能以附贈動作提前恢復成原本的形態。

【使用次數】你可以使用荒野形態兩次。當你完成短休時重獲一次已消耗的使用次數，並在完成長休時重獲所有已消耗的使用次數。

當你達到特定的德魯伊等級時，你會獲得額外的荒野形態次數，如@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbDruid00000000.JournalEntryPage.UCOh3zlvGxyk5jLr#class-features]{德魯伊特性}表中的荒野形態一欄所示。

當前使用次數：[[lookup @scale.druid.wild-shape-uses]]

【已知形態】通過此特性你知曉四種野獸形態，從挑戰等級最高為1/4且不具有飛行速度的野獸中選擇。推薦選擇 @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.actors.Actor.phbmobRat0000000]{老鼠}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.actors.Actor.phbmobRidingHors]{馱馬}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.actors.Actor.phbmobSpider0000]{蜘蛛}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.actors.Actor.phbmobWolf000000]{狼}。當你完成長休時，你可以用另一個符合條件的野獸替換你已知的某個形態。

Wild Shape Automation

When you've selected the creature you would like to wild shape into you can drag it onto your character sheet, select the Wild Shape option, and Foundry will automatically update your sheet. You can revert the transformation at the top of your sheet or by right clicking on your Actor in the sidebar.

當你提升到特定的德魯伊等級，你已知形態的數量與其形態的最高挑戰等級將隨之增加，如野獸形態表所示。此外，當你到達8級德魯伊後，你可以選取具有飛行速度的野獸。

當前已知形態上限： [[lookup @scale.druid.known-forms]]

當前挑戰等級上限： [[lookup @scale.druid.wild-shape]]

當你選擇已知形態時，只要你的 DM 允許，你便可以參考《怪物圖鑑》或其他來源中適合的野獸。

野獸形態
德魯伊等級已知形態最高CR飛行速度
241/4否
461/2否
881是

變形時的規則，在變形狀態下，你保留你的個性，記憶和說話的能力，並適用下列規則：

【臨時生命值】當你進入荒野形態時，你將獲得等同於你德魯伊等級的臨時生命值。

【遊戲數據】 你的遊戲數據會被所選野獸的數據替代，但你保留你的生物類型、生命值、生命骰，智力、感知、魅力屬性，職業特性、語言、專長。你同時還會保留你所有的技能和豁免熟練，並在其中使用你的熟練加值，同時額外獲得所變生物具有的熟練。若該野獸數據列出的技能或豁免調整值比你的更高，則你可以使用其數據面板。

【無法施法】變形期間你不能施放法術，然而變形並不會中斷你已施放法術的專注，也不會影響你已經施放的法術。

【物件】你持握物件的能力取決於變形後的四肢，而非你原本的。此外，你需要選擇你原本的裝備是否會掉在地上、還是融入新形態、抑或是被新形態所穿戴。穿戴的裝備可以正常使用，但DM將根據生物的體型和形狀，決定你的新形態是否適合穿戴某件裝備。你的裝備並不會改變形狀或尺寸以符合你的新形態，而任何新形態無法穿戴的裝備會掉在地上或者融入新形態。當你處於變形形態時，融入新形態的裝備不會產生任何效果。

Foundry Note

You can activate this feature to track uses of your Wild Shape.

It will automatically restore a use on a Short Rest and all uses on a Long Rest.

College of Lore.name: 軼聞學院
College of Lore.description:
探索魔法知識的深度

軼聞學院的吟遊詩人從各種來源收集法術和秘密， 不論是學術典籍、神秘儀式還是坊間傳聞。該學院的成員會在圖書館甚至大學院校裡搜集知識，與會友交流分享所見所聞。在節日或公眾事件期間他們也會見面，然後痛快的暢所欲言。他們通常喜歡揭發腐敗與謊言，並嘲弄那些高高在上的要人與權威。

Ritual Adept.name: 儀式專家
Ritual Adept.description: 你可以將你的法術書中任何帶有儀式標籤的法術以@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.YSB1QtxZW2BI9f4Y#casting-without-slots]{儀式}方式施放。你無需準備這些法術，但你必須閱讀法術書才能以此方法施放法術。

Fighting Style.name: 戰鬥風格
Fighting Style.description:
你已磨練你的戰鬥技藝並獲得一項你所選擇的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbFeats00000000.JournalEntryPage.sbHImaCB8ZMEHYkb]{戰鬥風格專長}。推薦選擇@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.feats.Item.phbfstDefense000]。

每當你獲得戰士等級時，你可以將原專長替換為另一個不同的戰鬥風格專長。

Wizard.name: 法師
Wizard.description:
研習奧術力量的魔法學者

核心法師特徵

關鍵屬性

智力

生命骰

每法師等級D6

豁免熟練

智力與感知

技能熟練

從奧秘、歷史、洞悉、調查、醫學、自然、宗教中選擇2項

武器熟練

簡易武器

護甲訓練

無

起始裝備

選擇A或B： (A) 2把@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepDagger0000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagArcaneFocus]（@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepQuartersta]）、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagRobe0000000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.items.Item.LBajgahniRJbAgDr]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagScholarsPac]、[[/award 5GP]]；(B) [[/award 55GP]]

所謂法師，便是對魔法運作原理鑽研探索之人。噴射火焰，奧法閃電，欺詐幻象以及變換身形，這一切都可以由法師施法得來。不止如此，他們手中的魔法還可以喚來異界存在，一瞥未來明細，又或是降下護佑屏障。而最為強大的法術甚至可以點石成金，墜下隕石，打開通往異界的傳送門。

大多數法師都對魔法抱有學術研究的態度。他們研究魔法的理論基礎，尤其是魔法學派的法術分類。畢格比、塔莎、魔鄧肯和悠蘭德等知名法師在研究的基礎上發明了他們的招牌法術，如今這些法術已在多元宇宙中廣泛使用。

法師最接近普通人的生活就是擔任智者或講師。還有一些法師則會出售其服務而成為預言家，服役於軍隊，甚至用其力量實施犯罪或支配他人。

不過，知識與力量的誘惑還是足以令最不想冒險的法師走出其安全的圖書館和實驗室，前往那些廢墟和失落城市中。絕大多數法師堅信遠古時代的同行們掌握了一些現今已失傳許久的魔法奧秘。而只要找到這些秘密，就能獲得遠超現有魔法的強大力量。

成為法師…

作為首級角色

  • 獲得法師核心特徵表中的所有特徵。
  • 獲得法師特性表中列出的 1 級特性。

作為兼職角色

  • 獲得法師核心特徵表中的生命骰。
  • 獲得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbWizard0000000.JournalEntryPage.g7cMRWzsgAsEF7zC#class-features]{法師特性表}中列出的 1 級特性。請參閱第 2 章的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbCreatingAChar.JournalEntryPage.vcs4jfEKRxPCsgXm]{兼職規則}來確定可用的法術位。

擴充和替換法術書

你在提升等級時添加到法術書中的法術正體現了你所進行的魔法研究，但你也可能在冒險中發現其他可以抄錄進法術書中的法術。例如，你可以在發現一張記載法師法術的卷軸後，將其抄錄到你的法術書中。

將法術抄入法術書，當你發現一道1環以上法師法術時，只要你能夠準備該法術，並且也有時間去解讀和複製它，你便可以將其抄入你的法術書中。這個過程將消耗每法術環階2小時和50 GP。之後你就可以如法術書中的其他法術一般準備該法術了。

複製法術書，你可以將法術書中的法術複製到另一本書中。由於你已經知道如何施放這個法術，所以這個過程會比複製新法術到你的法術書中更快。你只需花費每個法術環階1小時和 10金幣。

若你的法術書遺失，則你可以用同樣的方法將你準備的法師法術複製到新的法術書中。而填寫新法術書剩餘的內容則需要你尋找新法術完成。因此，許多法師都會保留一本備用法術書。

Scholar.title: 學者
Scholar.hint: 學習法術之餘，你也在鑽研其他的學術領域。選擇下列一項你具有熟練的技能。你獲得所選技能的專精。

Epic Boon.title: 史詩恩惠
Epic Boon.hint: 你獲得一項史詩恩惠專長或另一個符合條件你所選擇的專長。推薦選擇咒法回流恩惠。

Reliable Talent.name: Reliable Talent
Reliable Talent.description:
Whenever you make an ability check that uses one of your skill or tool proficiencies, you can treat a d20 roll of 9 or lower as a 10.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which automates the minimum roll of 10 on your skill and tool proficiencies.

Life Domain Spells.name: 生命領域法術
Life Domain Spells.description:
你與此神聖領域的連結保證你始終準備特定法術。當你達到生命領域法術列表上指定的牧師等級時，你視為始終準備法術表上的法術。

生命領域法術
牧師等級準備法術
3

@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplAid0000000]{援助術}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplBless00000]{祝福術}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplCureWounds]{治療傷勢},
@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplLesserRest]{次級復原術}

5@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplMassHealin]{Mass Healing Word}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplRevivify00]{回生術}
7@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplAuraofLife]{Aura of Life}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplDeathWard0]{Death Ward}
9@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplGreaterRes]{高等復原術}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplMassCureWo]{群體治療傷勢}

Foundry Note

These spells are granted automatically as you advance.

phbpdnSpellcasti.name: 施法
phbpdnSpellcasti.description:
你學會透過冥想與祈禱施法。參見第七章的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.mh3akteBDiLegqFK]{施法規則}。以下資訊詳細說明了如何將這些規則與聖騎士法術結合使用。聖騎士法術即該職業描述後的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.8yD9Jgp404hfZ9ie]{聖騎士法術列表}中羅列的法術。

【法術位】@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbPaladin000000.JournalEntryPage.A34CXe4HdzXHoBEl#class-features]{聖騎士特性表}記錄了你有多少法術位以施放1環以上的法術。當你完成長休時，你會重獲所有消耗的法術位。

【準備1環以上的法術】通過此特性施法前，你需要準備數個可用的1環以上法術所構成的準備列表。首先，選擇兩個 1 環聖騎士法術。推薦選擇英雄氣概和熾炎斬。

你的準備列表上的法術數量將隨著聖騎士等級而增加，如聖騎士特性表中準備法術一欄所示。每當該數量增加時，選擇額外的聖騎士法術來添加到你的準備列表中，直到你準備列表上的法術數量與聖騎士特性表中的數量相匹配。所選法術的環階必須是你擁有的法術位。例如，作為 5 級聖騎士，你的準備法術列表應該包括六個任意組合的1環或2環聖騎士法術。

若其他聖騎士特性給予你始終準備的法術，則這些法術不會計入你在此特性中的準備法術數量，但是這些法術對你而言仍視為聖騎士法術。

【更換準備法術】每當你完成長休時，你可以將準備列表中的一個法術，替換為另一個你擁有法術位的聖騎士法術。

【施法屬性】 魅力是你施放聖騎士法術的施法屬性。

【施法法器】 你可以使用聖徽作為聖騎士法術的施法法器。

Second-Story Work.name: Second-Story Work
Second-Story Work.description:
You've trained to get into especially hard-to-reach places, granting you these benefits.

Climber. You gain a Climb Speed equal to your Speed.

Jumper. You can determine your &Reference[Jumping]{jump} distance using your Dexterity rather than your Strength.

Foundry Note

This feature does not automatically add the Climb Speed and will have to be added manually.

phbpdnChannelDiv.name: 引導神力
phbpdnChannelDiv.description:
你可以引導來自外層位面的神聖力量，激發各種魔法效果。你首先學會創造一種效應：神聖感知，如下所述。其他聖騎士特性提供了額外的引導神力效應選項。每當你使用本職業的引導神力，你都需要從本職業的引導神力中選擇你要創造的效應。

你可以使用本職業的引導神兩次。當你完成短休時重獲一次已消耗的使用次數，並當你完成長休時重獲所有已消耗的使用次數。你在聖騎士等級到達 11 級時額外獲得一次使用次數。

若一個引導神力效應需要豁免檢定，則該DC等同於本職業施法特性的法術豁免DC。

【神聖感知】作為附贈動作，你擴展自己的意識以偵測天界、邪魔、不死生物。在接下來的10分鐘或直到你陷入無力狀態前，你能知曉自身60呎內上述類型生物的位置以及其生物類型。在同樣的範圍內，你也能偵測任何受到類似法術@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplHallow0000]祝福或褻瀆的地點或物件。

Foundry Note

The uses of your Channel Divinity increase automatically as you level up. It automatically regains the correct uses after Short and Long Rests.

The Divine Sense activity includes an Active Effect but it does not automatically reveal the given creatures.

Evasion.name: 反射閃避
Evasion.description:
You can nimbly dodge out of the way of certain dangers. When you’re subjected to an effect that allows you to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, you instead take no damage if you succeed on the saving throw and only half damage if you fail. You can’t use this feature if you have the Incapacitated condition.

Foundry Note

With your token selected you can either right click on the damage roll's chat card and select  Apply Half Damage or click the "1/2" button and then the  Apply button.

phbrgrSpellcasti.name: 施法
phbrgrSpellcasti.description:
你學會運用自然世界的魔法本源進行施法。參見@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.mh3akteBDiLegqFK]{施法規則}。以下資訊詳細說明了如何將這些規則與遊俠法術結合使用。遊俠法術即該職業描述後的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.5HnIk6HsrSxkvkz5]中羅列的法術。

【法術位】@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbRanger0000000.JournalEntryPage.fgzoeAJE4EEUSOYQ#class-features]{遊俠特性表}記錄了你有多少法術位以施放1環以上的法術。當你完成長休時，你會重獲所有消耗的法術位。

【準備1環以上的法術】通過此特性施法前，你需要準備數個可用的1環以上法術所構成的準備列表。首先，選擇兩個1環遊俠法術。推薦選擇@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplCureWounds]和@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplEnsnaringS]。

你的準備列表上的法術數量將隨著遊俠等級而增加，如遊俠特性表中準備法術一欄所示。每當該數量增加時，選擇額外的遊俠法術來添加到你的準備列表中，直到你準備列表上的法術數量與遊俠特性表中的數量相匹配。所選法術的環階必須是你擁有的法術位。例如，作為 5 級遊俠，你的準備法術列表應該包括六個任意組合的 1 環或 2 環遊俠法術。

若其他遊俠特性給予你始終準備的法術，則這些法術不會計入你在此特性中的準備法術數量，但是這些法術對你而言仍視為遊俠法術。

【更換準備法術】每當你完成長休時，你可以將準備列表中的一個法術，替換為另一個你擁有法術位的遊俠法術。

【施法屬性】感知是你施放遊俠法術的施法屬性。

【施法法器】 你可以使用德魯伊法器作為遊俠法術的施法法器。

Indomitable Might.description: If your total for a Strength check or Strength saving throw is less than your Strength score, you can use that score in place of the total.
Indomitable Might.name: Indomitable Might

Empowered Spell.name: 強效法術
Empowered Spell.description:
消耗：1術法點

當你為法術擲傷害骰時，你可以消耗 1 術法點重擲其中至多等同於你魅力調整值（最小為1，當前[[lookup @abilities.cha.mod]]）的傷害骰，且你必須使用重擲的結果。

即使你已經在施法時應用了不同的超魔法選項，你仍可以使用強效法術。

Empowered Spell.name: 強效法術
Empowered Spell.condition: 當你為法術擲傷害骰時

Elemental Fury: Primal Strike.name: 元素怒火：原力蠻擊
Elemental Fury: Primal Strike.description:
Once on each of your turns when you hit a creature with an attack roll using a weapon or a Beast form's attack in Wild Shape, you can cause the target to take an extra 1d8 [[/damage 1d8 type=cold]]{cold}, [[/damage 1d8 type=fire]]{fire}, [[/damage 1d8 type=lightning]]{lightning}, or [[/damage 1d8 type=thunder]]{thunder} damage (choose when you hit).

Foundry Note

This feature's damage will automatically increase when you gain @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.classes.Item.phbdrdImprovedEl]{Improved Elemental Fury}. If using the activity you will be able to select the damage type when rolling. It will default to your previously chosen damage type.

Sorcerous Restoration.name: 術法復原
Sorcerous Restoration.description:
當你完成短休時，你可以重獲數量等同於不超過你術士等級一半的已消耗術法點（向下取整）。一旦你使用此特性後，直到你完成一次長休前無法再次使用。

Foundry Note

This feature includes 1 free user per Long Rest. Use it to automatically regain the correct number of Sorcery Points.

Fast Hands.name: Fast Hands
Fast Hands.description:
As a Bonus Action, you can do one of the following.

Sleight of Hand. Make a Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) check to pick a lock or disarm a trap with Thieves' Tools or to pick a pocket.

Use an Object. Take the Utilize action, or take the Magic action to use a magic item that requires that action.

Foundry Note

The Sleight of Hand and Thieves' Tools activities include the relevant checks.

The Use an Object activity can be used for tracking Bonus Action use.

Magical Discoveries.description:
You learn two spells of your choice. These spells can come from the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.SkHptN2PTzFGDaEj]{Cleric}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.LhvuDQEyrCdg5EfU]{Druid}, or @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.6AnqLUowgdsqMFvz]{Wizard} spell list or any combination thereof. A spell you choose must be a cantrip or a spell for which you have spell slots, as shown in the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbBard000000000.JournalEntryPage.V8pqIWlaL9GhY61t#equipment]{Bard Features} table.

You always have the chosen spells prepared, and whenever you gain a Bard level, you can replace one of the spells with another spell that meets these requirements.
Magical Discoveries.name: Magical Discoveries

Druid.name: 德魯伊
Druid.description:
擁有原初力量的自然祭司

核心德魯伊特徵

關鍵屬性

感知

生命骰

每德魯伊等級D8

豁免熟練

智力與感知

技能熟練

從奧秘、馴獸、洞悉、醫藥、自然、察覺、宗教、求生中選擇兩項

武器熟練

簡易武器

工具熟練

草藥師工具組

護甲訓練

輕甲和盾牌

起始裝備

選擇A或B： (A) @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbarmLeatherArm]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbarmShield0000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepSickle0000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagDruidicFocu]（@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepQuartersta]）、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagExplorersPa]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbtulHerbalismK]、[[/award 9GP]]; or (B) [[/award 50GP]]

德魯伊屬於呼喚自然之力的古老教派。利用動物、植物和四大元素的魔力，德魯伊們可以治癒疾病、變身動物，乃至駕馭元素施加毀滅。

德魯伊崇敬自然至上，他們的魔法來自自然、自然神祇，或兩者兼有。通常，德魯伊會與其他德魯伊一起進行儀式，以記錄季節和自然週期的變化。

德魯伊不僅關注並維持著動植物間微妙的生態平衡，更注重人類與自然的和諧相處。通常，德魯伊們守護著聖地或看顧未受破壞的自然區域，但當世界出現重大危險之時，德魯伊亦將作為冒險者主動出擊，與之抗衡。

成為德魯伊…

作為首級角色

  • 獲得德魯伊核心特徵表中的所有特徵。
  • 獲得德魯伊特性表中列出的 1 級特性。

作為兼職角色

  • 獲得下列德魯伊核心特徵表中的特徵：生命骰以及輕甲和盾牌的訓練。
  • 獲得德魯伊特性表中列出的 1 級特性。請參閱第 2 章中的兼職規則來確定你的可用法術位。

Primal Order.title: 原初誓約
Primal Order.hint: 你已將自己奉獻給下列一種神聖使命

Elemental Fury.title: 元素怒火
Elemental Fury.hint: 元素的力量在你身上流淌。你獲得下列你所選擇的其中一種效果

Druidic.title: 德魯伊語
Druidic.hint: 你知曉德魯伊語，這是一種德魯伊間的秘密語言。

Archdruid.name: 大德魯伊
Archdruid.description:
The vitality of nature constantly blooms within you, granting you the following benefits.

Evergreen Wild Shape. Whenever you roll Initiative and have no uses of Wild Shape left, you regain one expended use of it.

Nature Magician. You can convert uses of Wild Shape into a spell slot (no action required). Choose a number of your unexpended uses of Wild Shape and convert them into a single spell slot, with each use contributing 2 spell levels. For example, if you convert two uses of Wild Shape, you produce a level 4 spell slot. Once you use this benefit, you can't do so again until you finish a Long Rest.

Longevity. The primal magic that you wield causes you to age more slowly. For every ten years that pass, your body ages only one year.

Foundry Note

This feature does not automate regaining a use of Wild Shape when rolling initiative but it does include an activity which will restore a use when activated.

The Nature Magician activity can be used to convert Wild Shape uses to spell slots.

Seeking Spell.name: 追蹤法術
Seeking Spell.description:
消耗：1術法點

若你為一道法術進行攻擊檢定並失手時，你可以消耗1術法點以重擲d20，且你必須使用新的結果。

即使你已經在施法時應用了另一個不同的超魔法選項，你仍可以使用追蹤法術。

Seeking Spell.name: 追蹤法術
Seeking Spell.condition: 當你為一道法術進行攻擊檢定並失手時

Acid.name: Acid
Acid.condition: When you cast a spell that deals damage of your elemental affinity

Cold.name: Cold
Cold.condition: When you cast a spell that deals damage of your elemental affinity

Poison.condition: When you cast a spell that deals damage of your elemental affinity
Poison.name: Poison

Fire.condition: When you cast a spell that deals damage of your elemental affinity
Fire.name: Fire

Lightning.condition: When you cast a spell that deals damage of your elemental affinity
Lightning.name: Lightning

Elemental Affinity.name: Elemental Affinity
Elemental Affinity.description:
Your draconic magic has an affinity with a damage type associated with dragons. Choose one of those types: Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, or Poison.

You have Resistance to that damage type, and when you cast a spell that deals damage of that type, you can add your Charisma modifier to one damage roll of that spell.

Foundry Note

You will be prompted to choose the damage type as you level up. The additional damage is not automatically added but this feature includes an activity for each type of damage.

You can speed up use of this feature by moving your chosen damage type to the top and it will be used automatically when using this feature.

Blessed Warrior.description: 你習得兩項你所選擇的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.SkHptN2PTzFGDaEj#cantrip]{牧師戲法}。建議選擇@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplGuidance00]{神導術}及@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplSacredFlam]{聖焰}。所選戲法對你來說是聖騎士法術，而魅力是你的施法屬性。每當你獲得聖騎士等級時，你能夠將一個已知戲法替換為另一個牧師戲法。
Blessed Warrior.name: 受祝勇士

Circle of the Land Spells.name: 大地結社法術
Circle of the Land Spells.description:
Whenever you finish a Long Rest, choose one type of land: arid, polar, temperate, or tropical. Consult the table below that corresponds to the chosen type; you have the spells listed for your Druid level and lower prepared.

Arid Land
Druid LevelCircle Spells
3@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplBlur000000]{Blur}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplBurningHan]{燃燒之手}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplFireBolt00]{Fire Bolt}

Foundry Note

This feature does not automate swapping between prepared spell options.

Superior Hunter's Defense.name: Superior Hunter's Defense
Superior Hunter's Defense.description:
When you take damage, you can take a Reaction to give yourself Resistance to that damage and any other damage of the same type until the end of the current turn.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect for resisting each type of damage which can be applied to get the relevant resistance. Be sure you disable/delete the previous Active Effect in the "Effects" tab of your sheet when you change Resistances.

Improved Brutal Strike (2).description:
The extra damage of your Brutal Strike increases to 2d10. In addition, you can use two different Brutal Strike effects whenever you use your Brutal Strike feature.

Foundry Note

The damage roll in Brutal Strike will automatically scale to use this new value.
Improved Brutal Strike (2).name: Improved Brutal Strike (2)

Channel Divinity.name: 引導神力
Channel Divinity.description:
你可以引導來自外層位面的神聖力量，激發各種魔法效果。你首先學會創造兩種效應：神聖火花和驅散不死生物，並在下文分別詳述。每當你使用本職業的引導神力，你都需要從本職業的引導神力中選擇你要創造的效應。你將在更高的牧師等級獲得額外的引導神力效應選項。

你可以使用此職業的引導神力兩次。當你完成短休時重獲一次已消耗的使用次數，且當你完成長休時重獲所有已消耗的使用次數。當你達到特定的牧師等級時，你將獲得額外的使用次數，如牧師特性表中的引導神力一欄所示。

若一個引導神力效應需要豁免檢定，則該DC等同於此職業施法特性中的法術豁免DC。

【神聖火花】作為魔法動作，你舉起聖徽指向30呎內的另一個你所能看見的生物，並將神聖能量聚焦於其，擲1d8並加上你的感知調整值。你可以恢復該生物等同於結果總值的生命值，或是迫使該生物進行體質豁免檢定。在豁免失敗時，該生物承受等同於結果總值的光耀或黯蝕傷害（由你選擇）；在成功豁免時，該生物僅承受一半傷害（向下取整）。

隨著等級提升，能增加擲出d8骰的數量。當你達到牧師7級時2d8、13級時3d8、18級時4d8。

【驅散不死生物】作為魔法動作，你展示你的聖徽並說出斥責不死生物的禱詞。每個距離你30呎內的不死生物必須進行感知豁免檢定。若該生物豁免失敗，則其陷入恐懼與無力狀態1分鐘。在此期間，這些生物在其回合中盡可能遠離你。若生物承受任何傷害、你陷入無力狀態或死亡，則此效應提前終止。

Foundry Note

This feature will automatically restore 1 use on a Short Rest and all on a Long Rest. The uses scale automatically as you level up.

The Divine Spark: Heal activity includes the healing effect.

The Divine Spark: Save activity includes the saving throw.

The Turn Undead activity includes an Active Effect that applies the Frightened and Incapacitated conditions.

Improved Critical.description:
Your attack rolls with weapons and Unarmed Strikes can score a Critical Hit on a roll of 19 or 20 on the d20.

Foundry Note

This feature automatically increases the Critical Hit threshold to 19.
Improved Critical.name: Improved Critical

Blessed Strikes: Divine Strike.name: Blessed Strikes: Divine Strike

Radiant Divine Strike.target: When you a hit a creature with an attack roll using a weapon once per turn
Radiant Divine Strike.name: Radiant Divine Strike

Necrotic Divine Strike.name: Necrotic Divine Strike
Necrotic Divine Strike.target: When you a hit a creature with an attack roll using a weapon once per turn

Blessed Strikes: Divine Strike.description:
Once on each of your turns when you hit a creature with an attack roll using a weapon, you can cause the target to take an extra 1d8 Necrotic or Radiant damage (your choice).

Foundry Note

This feature's damage will automatically increase when you gain @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.classes24.Item.phbclcImprovedBl]{Improved Blessed Strikes}.

Thief.name: 竊賊
Thief.description:
Hunt for Treasure as a Classic Adventurer

A mix of burglar, treasure hunter, and explorer, you are the epitome of an adventurer. In addition to improving your agility and stealth, you gain abilities useful for delving into ruins and getting maximum benefit from the magic items you find there.

phbrgrFightingSt.name: 戰鬥風格
phbrgrFightingSt.description:
你獲得一項你所選擇的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbFeats00000000.JournalEntryPage.sbHImaCB8ZMEHYkb]{戰鬥風格專長} 。你可以選擇以下選項，而非上述這些專長。

@Embed[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.feats.Item.phbfstDruidicWar caption=false]

Elemental Fury.name: 元素怒火
Elemental Fury.description:
The might of the elements flows through you. You gain one of the following options of your choice.

Potent Spellcasting. Add your Wisdom modifier to the damage you deal with any Druid cantrip.

Primal Strike. Once on each of your turns when you hit a creature with an attack roll using a weapon or a Beast form's attack in Wild Shape, you can cause the target to take an extra 1d8 [[/damage 1d8 type=cold]]{cold}, [[/damage 1d8 type=fire]]{fire}, [[/damage 1d8 type=lightning]]{lightning}, or [[/damage 1d8 type=thunder]]{thunder} damage (choose when you hit).

Foundry Note

You will be prompted to choose during advancement.

Blessed Healer.name: Blessed Healer
Blessed Healer.description:
The healing spells you cast on others heal you as well. Immediately after you cast a spell with a spell slot that restores Hit Points to one or more creatures other than yourself, you regain Hit Points equal to 2 plus the spell slot's level.

Foundry Note

This feature includes a healing activity. Set the scale to the spell slot level you cast and it will provide a healing roll for you.

Mask of Many Faces.name: 千面之臉
Mask of Many Faces.description:
先決條件：契術師等級2以上

你可以不消耗任何法術位施放@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplDisguiseSe]{易容術}。

Foundry Note

The Cast activity can be used in-place of Disguise Self and includes an Active Effect for tracking when you are disguised.

Disguised.name: Disguised
Disguised.description: To discern that you are disguised, a creature must take the Study action to inspect your appearance and succeed on an [[/check ability=int skill=inv]] check against your spell save DC.

Disciple of Life.description:
When a spell you cast with a spell slot restores Hit Points to a creature, that creature regains additional Hit Points on the turn you cast the spell. The additional Hit Points equal 2 plus the spell slot's level.

Foundry Note

This feature includes a healing activity. Set the scale to the spell slot level you cast and it will provide a healing roll for you.
Disciple of Life.name: Disciple of Life

heal.target: Create you cast a healing spell on

Barbarian.name: 野蠻人
Barbarian.description:
原始狂怒的兇猛戰士

野蠻人核心特性

關鍵屬性

力量

生命骰

每野蠻人等級D12

豁免熟練

力量和體質

技能熟練

選擇2個：馴獸、運動、威嚇、自然、察覺或求生

武器熟練

簡易武器和軍用武器

護甲訓練

輕甲、中甲、盾牌

起始裝備

選擇A或B： (A) @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepGreataxe00]、4個@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepHandaxe000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagExplorersPa]、[[/award 15GP]]; or (B) [[/award 75GP]]

野蠻人是強大的戰士，他們由多元宇宙的原初力量所驅動，而這股力量便是「狂暴」。野蠻人的狂暴不只是一種情感，而且是獵食者在絕境中激發的兇暴，是暴風雨般不顧一切的猛襲，也是大海中翻滾不息的波濤。

有些野蠻人將「狂暴」具象為兇蠻的靈體，或敬仰的先祖；有些野蠻人卻認為狂暴與世界的痛苦悲傷皆有聯繫，還有人認為狂暴是來自狂野魔法的無情糾纏；更有些人認為，狂暴是他們內心最深處的一種自我表達。對所有野蠻人來說，這股狂暴不僅為他們點燃了戰鬥狂熱，更是他們靈活閃避、抵禦傷害和增強力量的源泉。

野蠻人通常扮演著社群的保護者和領導者。他們往往隻身衝向危險，只為保護他人。敢於面對任何危險的勇氣使野蠻人非常適合冒險。

成為野蠻人...

作為首級角色

  • 獲得野蠻人核心特徵表中的所有特徵。
  • 獲得野蠻人特性表中列出的1級特性。

作為兼職角色

  • 獲得野蠻人核心特徵表中的以下特徵：生命骰、熟練軍用武器、盾牌訓練。
  • 獲得野蠻人特性表中列出的 1 級特性。

Primal Champion.title: 原初勇士
Primal Champion.hint: 你體現了原初的力量。你的力量與體質提升4點，上限為25。

Weapon Mastery.title: 武器精通
Weapon Mastery.hint: 你受過武器的訓練，令你能夠使用額外武器的精通屬性。

Primal Knowledge.title: 原初知識
Primal Knowledge.hint: 你獲得1級野蠻人技能列表可用的另一項技能熟練。

Aura of Protection.name: Aura of Protection
Aura of Protection.description:
You radiate a protective, unseeable aura in a 10-foot Emanation that originates from you. The aura is inactive while you have the &Reference[Incapacitated apply=false] condition.

You and your allies in the aura gain a bonus to saving throws equal to your Charisma modifier (minimum bonus of +1, currently [[lookup @abilities.cha.mod]]).

If another Paladin is present, a creature can benefit from only one Aura of Protection at a time; the creature chooses which aura while in them.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which automatically improves your Saving Throws but it should not be used for other impacted characters because it will add their Charisma modifier and not the Paladin's. They should add your modifier manually.

Heightened Focus.name: 出神入化
Heightened Focus.description:
Your Flurry of Blows, Patient Defense, and Step of the Wind gain the following benefits.

Flurry of Blows. You can expend 1 Focus Point to use Flurry of Blows and make three Unarmed Strikes with it instead of two.

Patient Defense. When you expend a Focus Point to use Patient Defense, you gain a number of Temporary Hit Points equal to two rolls of your Martial Arts die.

Step of the Wind. When you expend a Focus Point to use Step of the Wind, you can choose a willing creature within 5 feet of yourself that is Large or smaller. You move the creature with you until the end of your turn. The creature's movement doesn't provoke Opportunity Attacks.

Foundry Note

The Flurry of Blows activity will expend 1 Focus Point and you can then make three Unarmed Strikes.

The Patient Defense activity will roll the Temporary Hit Points for you.

Patient Defense.name: Patient Defense
Patient Defense.condition: When you expend a Focus Point to use Patient Defense

Font of Magic.name: 魔力泉湧
Font of Magic.description:
你開始運用體內的魔法源泉，從中湧現的魔力體現為術法點。你可以使用術法點創造各種魔法效應。

你擁有2術法點，並在你達到更高等級後獲得額外更多，如術士特性表中的術法點一欄所示。你擁有的術法點無法超過表中對應你當前等級的所列數值。當你完成長休時，你重獲所有已消耗的術法點。

你可以使用你的術法點以啟用以下選項，其他特性—比如超魔法也需要消耗術法點來使用。

【法術位轉換為術法點】你可以消耗一個法術位以獲得等同於該法術位環階的術法點（無需動作）。

【創造法術位】作為附贈動作，你可以將未消耗的術法點轉換為法術位。創造法術位表中列出創造各環階法術位所需的術法點，以及所需的最低術士等級。你可以創造的不高於5環的法術位。

當你完成長休時，任何你以此特性創造的法術位將消散。

創造法術位
法術位環階術法點花費最低術士等級
122
233
355
467
579

Foundry Note

The Regain Spell Slot activity will convert your Sorcery Points into spell slots.

The Regain Sorcery Points activity will convert your chosen spell slot into Sorcery Points.

Rage.name: 狂暴
Rage.description:
你可以灌輸自己一種被稱作狂暴的原初之力，其為你帶來極致的力量與強韌。若你為穿戴重甲，作為一個附贈動作，你可以進入狂暴。

你可以進入狂暴的次數，如同你野蠻人等級在野蠻人特性表中狂暴次數（Rages）欄所示。（當前 [[lookup @scale.barbarian.rage]]）。當你完成一次短休時，你重獲一次已消耗的使用次數，並在你完成一次長休時，重獲所有已消耗使用次數。

在啟用狂暴時，你須遵守以下規則。

【傷害抗性】你具有對鈍擊、穿刺、揮砍傷害的抗性。

【狂暴傷害】當你以武器或徒手打擊使用力量對目標進行攻擊並造成傷害時，你造成的傷害獲得額外加值，且此加值會隨著你野蠻人等級提升而成長，如野蠻人特性表中的狂暴傷害（Rage Damage）欄所示。

【力量優勢】你在力量檢定與力量豁免上具有優勢。

【無專注或法術】你無法維持專注，並且你不能施放法術。

【持續時間】狂暴持續到你下回合結束，且若你穿戴重甲或陷入無力狀態則提前終止。若在你啟用後的下回合仍處於狂暴，你可以執行下列其中一項以延長狂暴一輪：

  • 對敵人進行攻擊檢定。
  • 迫使敵人進行豁免檢定。
  • 以附贈動作延長你的狂暴。

每次延長狂暴，將使其持續至你的下個回合結束。你可以維持狂暴至多10 分鐘。

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which automates the Resistance and additional damage. This feature will also automatically recharge your Rage uses on a Short and Long Rest.

Land's Aid.name: Land's Aid
Land's Aid.description:
As a Magic action, you can expend a use of your Wild Shape and choose a point within 60 feet of yourself. Vitality-giving flowers and life-draining thorns appear for a moment in a 10-foot-radius Sphere centered on that point. Each creature of your choice in the Sphere must make a Constitution saving throw against your spell save DC, taking 2d6 Necrotic damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one. One creature of your choice in that area regains [[/healing @scale.land.lands-aid]]{[[lookup @scale.land.lands-aid]] Hit Points}.

The damage and healing increase by 1d6 when you reach Druid levels 10 (3d6) and 14 (4d6).

Foundry Note

This feature includes an activity for the saving throw and the healing.

The healing/damage values automatically scale as you level up.

Path of the Berserker.name: 狂戰士道途
Path of the Berserker.description:
引導狂暴進入暴力狂怒

遵行狂戰士道途的野蠻人將其狂暴化為根本上的暴力。狂戰士道途追求無拘的狂怒。因狂暴與怒火加持，他們在戰鬥的混沌快感中興奮，捨生忘死的投入廝殺。

Blessed Strikes: Potent Spellcasting.name: Blessed Strikes: Potent Spellcasting

damage.condition: Deal damage with any Cleric cantrip

Blessed Strikes: Potent Spellcasting.description:
Add your Wisdom modifier to the damage you deal with any Cleric cantrip.

Foundry Note

This bonus damage is not automatically included in your cantrips.

You can add [[lookup @abilities.wis.mod]] to the Situational Bonus field of your cantrip's damage rolls or you can permanently add it to your cantrips by adding "@abilities.wis.mod" (minus the quotes) in the Bonus field.

Alternatively, the Damage activity on this feature includes your Wisdom modifier and allows you to choose the damage type in the roll's dialog box.

Relentless Hunter.description: Taking damage can't break your Concentration on Hunter's Mark.
Relentless Hunter.name: Relentless Hunter

Peerless Skill.description: When you make an ability check or attack roll and fail, you can expend one use of Bardic Inspiration; roll the Bardic Inspiration die, and add the number rolled to the d20, potentially turning a failure into a success. On a failure, the Bardic Inspiration isn't expended.

utility.condition: When you fail an ability check or attack roll

Peerless Skill.name: Peerless Skill

Druidic Warrior.name: 德魯伊教戰士
Druidic Warrior.description: 你習得兩項你所選擇的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.LhvuDQEyrCdg5EfU]{德魯伊戲法}。建議選擇@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplGuidance00]{神導術}與@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplStarryWisp]{點點星芒}。所選戲法對你來說是遊俠法術，你的施法屬性為感知。每當你獲得遊俠等級時，你能夠將一個已知戲法替換為另一個德魯伊戲法。

Magical Cunning.name: 魔法機靈
Magical Cunning.description:
你可以舉行一場耗時1分鐘的秘傳儀式，並在儀式結束後恢復等同於你契約魔法最大法術位一半（向上取整）的法術位。一旦你使用此特性，直到你完成一次長休前無法再次使用。

Foundry Note

This feature includes one free use and will restore the correct number of Pact Magic spell slots.

Whispers of the Grave.description:
Prerequisite: Level 7+ Warlock

You can cast @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplSpeakwithD]{Speak with Dead} without expending a spell slot.
Whispers of the Grave.name: Whispers of the Grave

Open Hand Technique.name: 散打技巧
Open Hand Technique.description:
每當你使用疾風連擊的攻擊命中一個生物時，你可以強迫其承受下列效果之一：

【慌神】目標直到你的下個回合結束前都不能做出藉機攻擊。

【推離】目標必須通過一次力量豁免，否則將被推離最多15呎。

【失衡】目標必須通過一次敏捷豁免，否則將被擊倒伏地。

Foundry Note

The Addle activity includes an Active Effect for tracking the addled target.

The Topple activity includes an Active Effect that applies the Prone status.

Topple.condition: Whenever you hit a creature with an attack granted by your Flurry of Blows
Topple.name: Topple

Addle.name: Addle
Addle.condition: Whenever you hit a creature with an attack granted by your Flurry of Blows

Push.name: Push
Push.condition: Whenever you hit a creature with an attack granted by your Flurry of Blows

Fast Movement.name: 快速移動
Fast Movement.description:
若你為穿戴重甲，你的速度提升10呎。

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which will automatically increase your movement speed. Disable the Fast Movement Active Effect if you're wearing Heavy armor.

Oath of Devotion Spells.name: 奉獻之誓法術
Oath of Devotion Spells.description:
The magic of your oath ensures you always have certain spells ready; when you reach a Paladin level specified in the Oath of Devotion Spells table, 你視為始終準備法術表上的法術。

Oath of Devotion Spells
Paladin LevelSpells
3@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbEvilAndGoodPr]{Protection from Evil and Good}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplShieldofFa]{Shield of Faith}
5@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplAid0000000]{援助術}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplZoneofTrut]{Zone of Truth}
9@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplBeaconofHo]{Beacon of Hope}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplDispelMagi]{Dispel Magic}
13@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplFreedomofM]{Freedom of Movement}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplGuardianof]{虔誠守衛}
17@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplCommune000]{Commune}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplFlameStrik]{Flame Strike}

Foundry Note

法術會隨著你升級時自動獲得。

Faithful Steed.name: Faithful Steed
Faithful Steed.description:
You can call on the aid of an otherworldly steed. You always have the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplFindSteed0]{Find Steed} spell prepared.

You can also cast the spell once without expending a spell slot, and you regain the ability to do so when you finish a Long Rest.

Foundry Note

The Find Steed spell is added to your spell list as always prepared and with a free use per Long Rest when you reach this level.

Brutal Strike.name: Brutal Strike
Brutal Strike.description:
If you use [[/item Reckless Attack]], you can forgo any Advantage on one Strength-based attack roll of your choice on your turn. The chosen attack roll mustn't have Disadvantage. If the chosen attack roll hits, the target takes an extra [[lookup @scale.barbarian.brutal-strike]] damage of the same type dealt by the weapon or Unarmed Strike, and you can cause one Brutal Strike effect of your choice. You have the following effect options.

Forceful Blow. The target is pushed 15 feet straight away from you. You can then move up to half your Speed straight toward the target without provoking &Reference[Opportunity Attacks].

Hamstring Blow. The target's Speed is reduced by 15 feet until the start of your next turn. A target can be affected by only one Hamstring Blow at a time - the most recent one.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect for the Hamstring Blow which can be applied to a target.

The damage activity automatically scales when you gain Improved Brutal Strike (2).

Hamstrung.description: Hit by a hamstring blow, this character's Speed has been reduced by 15 feet until the start of the attacker's next turn.
Hamstrung.name: Hamstrung

Three Extra Attacks.description: You can attack four times instead of once whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.
Three Extra Attacks.name: Three Extra Attacks

Weapon Mastery.name: 武器精通
Weapon Mastery.description:
你對武器的訓練使你能夠使用兩種你所選擇且擁有熟練的武器精通屬性，例如長弓與短劍。

每當你完成一次長休時，你可以更換你所選擇的武器種類，例如你可以改為使用彎刀和長劍的精通屬性。

Draconic Sorcery.name: 龍族術法
Draconic Sorcery.description:
吐息巨龍魔法

你的天生魔法來自於巨龍的贈禮。或許是一條瀕死的遠古巨龍將一部分的魔力賜予你或你的先祖。你也可能從滿溢著巨龍之力的某處吸收了魔力。又或者，你取得一件從巨龍寶庫中出來的寶藏，其充滿龍族之力。亦或是你的先祖是一條巨龍。

Draconic Spells.title: 龍族法術
Draconic Spells.hint: 當你達到龍族法術表中所述的相應術士等級時，你視為始終準備法術表上的法術。

8UnvG3X4TR3MpCGe.hint:
你的龍族魔法表現出與某種巨龍的元素親和。選擇一種傷害類型：強酸、寒冷、火焰、閃電或毒素。
                
                你獲得該傷害類型的抗性。

Stroke of Luck.condition: When you fail a D20 Test
Stroke of Luck.name: Stroke of Luck

Stroke of Luck.description:
You have a marvelous knack for succeeding when you need to. If you fail a D20 Test, you can turn the roll into a 20.

Once you use this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a Short or Long Rest.
Stroke of Luck.name: Stroke of Luck

Favored Enemy.name: 宿敵
Favored Enemy.description:
你始終準備@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplHuntersMar]{獵人印記}法術。你可以不消耗法術位施放此法術兩次，並在你完成一次長休後恢復所有此能力的使用次數。

你可以不消耗法術位施放此法術的次數會在你達到特定的遊俠等級時增加，具體詳見遊俠特性表中的宿敵一欄。

Foundry Note

The spell is granted to you at this level and will increase the number of free uses available automatically as you level up.

phbmnkEpicBoon00.name: 史詩恩惠
phbmnkEpicBoon00.description:
You gain an @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbFeats00000000.JournalEntryPage.GxfrwkJbrIvn7reC]{Epic Boon feat} or another feat of your choice for which you qualify. @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbFeats00000000.JournalEntryPage.GxfrwkJbrIvn7reC#boon-of-irresistible-offense]{Boon of Irresistible Offense} is recommended.

Foundry Note

You will be prompted for a choice while leveling up.

Contact Patron.name: Contact Patron
Contact Patron.description:
In the past, you usually contacted your patron through intermediaries. Now you can communicate directly; you always have the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplContactOth]{Contact Other Plane} spell prepared. With this feature, you can cast the spell without expending a spell slot to contact your patron, and you automatically succeed on the spell's saving throw.

Once you cast the spell with this feature, you can't do so in this way again until you finish a Long Rest.

Foundry Note

The spell is granted to you automatically at this level with a free use.

Wild Resurgence.name: 荒野復甦
Wild Resurgence.description:
Once on each of your turns, if you have no uses of Wild Shape left, you can give yourself one use by expending a spell slot (no action required).

In addition, you can expend one use of Wild Shape (no action required) to give yourself a level 1 spell slot, but you can't do so again until you finish a Long Rest.

Foundry Note

The Regain Wild Shape activity consumes a spell slot and grants you another use of Wild Shape.

The Regain Spell Slot activity will consume a use of Wild Shape and grant you a level 1 spell slot.

Regain Spell Slot.name: Regain Spell Slot
Regain Spell Slot.condition: Once on each of your turns

Pact of the Chain.name: 鎖鏈魔契
Pact of the Chain.description:
你習得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplFindFamili]法術，且可以不消耗任何法術位以魔法動作施放該法術。

當你施放該法術，你為魔寵選擇一種正常型態或是下列一種特殊形態：@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.actors.Actor.phbmobImp0000000]{小魔鬼}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.actors.Actor.phbmobPseudodrag]{偽龍}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.actors.Actor.phbmobQuasit0000]{誇塞魔}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.actors.Actor.phbmobSkeleton00]{骷髏}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.actors.Actor.phbmobSlaadTadpo]{史拉蟾蝌蚪}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.actors.Actor.phbmobSphinxofWo]{神奇斯芬克斯}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.actors.Actor.phbmobSprite0000]{小妖精}或@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.actors.Actor.phbmobVenomousSn]{毒蛇}.

此外，當你採取攻擊動作時，你可以放棄你自己攻擊中的其中一次，轉而讓你的魔寵以其反應進行一次攻擊。

Foundry Note

The Summon Familiar activity includes the normal summoning options and the Summon Familiar (Expanded Options) activity includes the additional options.

Fiend Patron.name: 邪魔宗主
Fiend Patron.description:
Make a Deal with the Lower Planes

Your pact draws on the Lower Planes, the realms of perdition. You might forge a bargain with a demon lord such as Demogorgon or Orcus; an archdevil such as Asmodeus; or a pit fiend, balor, yugoloth, or night hag that is especially mighty. That patron’s aims are evil—the corruption or destruction of all things, ultimately including you—and your path is defined by the extent to which you strive against those aims.

Fiend Spells.title: Fiend Spells
Fiend Spells.hint: 你宗主的魔法確保你始終準備特定的法術，當你達到邪魔法術表所提及的契術師等級時，你視為始終準備法術表上的法術。

Sorcery Incarnate.name: 術法化身
Sorcery Incarnate.description:
If you have no uses of Innate Sorcery left, you can use it if you spend 2術法點 when you take the Bonus Action to activate it.

In addition, while your Innate Sorcery feature is active, you can use up to two of your Metamagic options on each spell you cast.

Foundry Note

Use this feature to consume 2術法點 and restore a use of Innate Sorcery.

phbftrWeaponMast.description:
你對武器的訓練使你能夠使用三種你所選擇且擁有熟練的武器精通屬性。每當你完成一次長休時，你可以進行武器練習從而更換其中一種武器的選擇。

你可以掌握精通的武器數量將隨著戰士職業到達特定等級而增加如@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbFighter000000.JournalEntryPage.wDELe3k25FQvYdrq#class-features]{戰士特性}表中武器精通一欄所示。

Foundry Note

To change your masteries toggle on the "Edit" mode of your sheet. On the "Details" tab click on the cog icon next to "Weapons" in the bottom right. You can place a check in the mastery column of your chosen weapons.
phbftrWeaponMast.name: 武器精通

Relentless Rage.name: Relentless Rage
Relentless Rage.description:
Your Rage can keep you fighting despite grievous wounds. If you drop to 0 Hit Points while your Rage is active and don't die outright, you can make a DC 10 Constitution saving throw. If you succeed, your Hit Points instead change to a number equal to twice your Barbarian level.

Each time you use this feature after the first, the DC increases by 5. When you finish a Short or Long Rest, the DC resets to 10.

Foundry Note

This feature will automatically increase the DC by 5 if you consume the resource when activating it. It will also automatically reset to 10 after a Short or Long Rest.

Superior Defense.description:
At the start of your turn, you can expend 3 Focus Points to bolster yourself against harm for 1 minute or until you have the Incapacitated condition. During that time, you have Resistance to all damage except Force damage.

Foundry Note

This feature will expend 3 Focus Points and includes an Active Effect which will apply the relevant Resistances.
Superior Defense.name: Superior Defense

utility.condition: At the start of your turn

Precise Hunter.description: You have Advantage on attack rolls against the creature currently marked by your Hunter's Mark.
Precise Hunter.name: Precise Hunter

Circle of the Land.name: 大地結社
Circle of the Land.description:
Celebrate Connection to the Natural World

The Circle of the Land comprises mystics and sages who safeguard ancient knowledge and rites. These Druids meet within sacred circles of trees or standing stones to whisper primal secrets in Druidic. The circle's wisest members preside as the chief priests of their communities.

Champion.name: 勇士
Champion.description:
Pursue Physical Excellence in Combat

A Champion focuses on the development of martial prowess in a relentless pursuit of victory. Champions combine rigorous training with physical excellence to deal devastating blows, withstand peril, and garner glory. Whether in athletic contests or bloody battle, Champions strive for the crown of the victor.

Hunter's Lore.name: 獵人學識
Hunter's Lore.description: 你可以召喚自然神力以顯露獵物的優勢和弱點。當生物被你的獵人印記標記時，你將知曉該生物是否擁有任何免疫、抗性或易傷，以及知曉分別是什麼。

Eldritch Smite.name: 魔能重斬
Eldritch Smite.description:
先決條件：契術師等級5以上，具有@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.classes.Item.phbinvPactBlade0]{鋒刃魔契}祈喚

每回合一次，當你使用你的契約武器命中一個生物時，你可以消耗一個契約魔法法術位對目標造成額外的1d8 + 每法術位環階1d8的力場傷害，並且若目標體型在巨型以下，則可以使其陷入&Reference[Prone]狀態

Foundry Note

The Smite activity consumes a Pact Magic spell slot and increases the damage based on your pact spell level.

Smite.name: Smite
Smite.condition: Hit a creature with your pact weapon

Gift of the Depths.name: Gift of the Depths
Gift of the Depths.description:
Prerequisite: Level 5+ Warlock

You can breathe underwater, and you gain a Swim Speed equal to your Speed.

You can also cast @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplWaterBreat]{Water Breathing} once without expending a spell slot. You regain the ability to cast it in this way again when you finish a Long Rest.

Foundry Note

The Gift Water Breathing activity consumes a limited use and includes an Active Effect for tracking the chosen creatures.

phbbrdEpicBoon00.name: 史詩恩惠
phbbrdEpicBoon00.description: You gain an @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbFeats00000000.JournalEntryPage.GxfrwkJbrIvn7reC]{Epic Boon} feat or another feat of your choice for which you qualify. Boon of Spell Recall is recommended.

Tactical Master.name: Tactical Master
Tactical Master.description: When you attack with a weapon whose mastery property you can use, you can replace that property with the Push, Sap, or Slow property for that attack.

Ranger.name: 遊俠
Ranger.description:
身懷原初魔法的流浪武者

遊俠核心特徵

關鍵屬性

敏捷和感知

生命骰

每遊俠等級D10

豁免熟練

力量與敏捷

技能熟練

從馴獸、運動、洞悉、調查、自然、察覺、隱匿和求生中選擇3項

武器熟練

簡易和軍用武器

護甲訓練

輕甲、中甲、盾牌

起始裝備

選擇A或B： (A) @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbarmStuddedLea]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepScimitar00]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepShortsword]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepLongbow000]、20支@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbamoArrows0000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagQuiver00000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagDruidicFocu]（@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbdfcSprigofmis]）、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagExplorersPa]、[[/award 7GP]]；(B) [[/award 150GP]]

離開城鎮的喧囂，即是茂密的森林和廣袤的原野。這正是遊俠們進行無盡守望之地。他們向掠食者們學習如何追蹤獵物，借助荒野中的灌木叢和碎石在陰影中潛行。

熟悉荒野的遊俠們得以利用自然之力施展法術。為保護世界免受魔物和暴君的破壞，遊俠們的天賦和魔法往往都需要經歷刀口舔血般的磨練。

成為遊俠…

作為首級角色

  • 獲得遊俠核心特徵表中的所有特徵。
  • 獲得遊俠特性表中列出的1級特性。

作為兼職角色

  • 獲得遊俠核心特徵表中的以下特徵：生命骰，軍用武器熟練，遊俠技能熟練中選擇其一，以及輕甲、中甲、盾牌訓練。
  • 獲得遊俠特性表中列出的1級特性。請參閱第2章的兼職規則以確定可用的法術位。

Elemental Fury: Potent Spellcasting.name: 元素怒火：強力施法
Elemental Fury: Potent Spellcasting.description:
任何你以德魯伊戲法所造成的傷害添加上你的感知調整值（當前感知調整值：[[lookup @abilities.wis.mod]]）。

Foundry Note

This feature does not automate the addition of the Wisdom modifier to Druid cantrips.

Distant Spell.name: 遠程法術
Distant Spell.description:
消耗：1術法點

當你施放射程至少5尺的法術時，你可以消耗1術法點使法術射程翻倍。或者，當你施放射程為觸及的法術時，你可以消耗1術法點使法術射程變為30尺。

Distant Spell.name: 遠程法術
Distant Spell.condition: 當你施放射程至少5尺的法術或當你施放射程為觸及的法術時

Aura of Courage.name: 勇氣靈光
Aura of Courage.description:
You and your allies have Immunity to the Frightened condition while in your Aura of Protection. If a Frightened ally enters the aura, that condition has no effect on that ally while there.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect for tracking who is within your aura but it is not automatically added/removed nor does it remove the Frightened condition.

Tactical Mind.name: 戰術思維
Tactical Mind.description: 無論在戰場內外，你都具有卓越的戰術思維。當你屬性檢定失敗時，你可以消耗一次回氣使用次數讓自己更接近成功。你擲1d10並將結果加入屬性檢定中而非恢復生命值，此舉可能使結果變為成功。若檢定依舊失敗，則回氣使用次數將不會被消耗。

Sear Undead.description:
Whenever you use Turn Undead, you can roll a number of d8s equal to your Wisdom modifier (minimum of 1d8, currently [[lookup @abilities.wis.mod]]) and add the rolls together. Each Undead that fails its saving throw against that use of Turn Undead takes Radiant damage equal to the roll's total. This damage doesn't end the turn effect.

Foundry Note

This feature can be used in place of Turn Undead. It consumes a use of Channel Divinity, includes the Save, Active Effects for the conditions, and this feature's damage roll.
Sear Undead.name: Sear Undead

phbrgrExpertise0.name: 專精
phbrgrExpertise0.description:
Choose two of your skill proficiencies with which you lack Expertise. You gain Expertise in those skills.

Foundry Note

You will be prompted with a choice when you reach this level.

heal.condition: At the start of each of your turns

Survivor.description:
You attain the pinnacle of resilience in battle, giving you these benefits.

Defy Death. You have Advantage on Death Saving Throws. Moreover, when you roll 18–20 on a Death Saving Throw, you gain the benefit of rolling a 20 on it.

Heroic Rally. At the start of each of your turns, you regain Hit Points equal to 5 plus your Constitution modifier if you are Bloodied and have at least 1 Hit Point.

Foundry Note

This feature does not automate the Death Saving Throw changes. It includes an activity for healing but does not automatically add it when you are Bloodied.
Survivor.name: Survivor

Elusive.description: You're so evasive that attackers rarely gain the upper hand against you. No attack roll can have Advantage against you unless you have the Incapacitated condition.
Elusive.name: Elusive

Foe Slayer.description:
@UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplHuntersMar]{Hunter's Mark} is a d10 rather than a d6.

Foundry Note

You may use this feature in place of the Bonus Mark Damage activity on the Hunter's Mark spell.
Foe Slayer.name: Foe Slayer

Quickened Spell.name: 瞬發法術
Quickened Spell.description:
消耗：2術法點

當你施放一道施法時間為動作的法術時你可以消耗2術法點將其施法時間改為附贈動作。你無法在已施放過1環以上法術的回合中以此方式修改法術，也無法在已經以此方式修改過法術的回合中再施放1環以上法術。

Quickened Spell.name: 瞬發法術
Quickened Spell.condition: 當你施放施法時間為動作的法術時

Decrease Exhaustion.name: Decrease Exhaustion
Decrease Exhaustion.condition: Whenever you finish a Short Rest

Tireless.name: Tireless
Tireless.description:
Primal forces now help fuel you on your journeys, granting you the following benefits.

Temporary Hit Points. As a Magic action, you can give yourself a number of Temporary Hit Points equal to 1d8 plus your Wisdom modifier (minimum of 1). You can use this action a number of times equal to your Wisdom modifier (minimum of once), and you regain all expended uses when you finish a Long Rest.

Decrease Exhaustion. Whenever you finish a Short Rest, your Exhaustion level, if any, decreases by 1.

Foundry Note

The Temporary Hit Points activity can apply the Temporary Hit Points to you.

The Decrease Exhaustion activity will decrease your Exhaustion.

Twinned Spell.name: 孿生法術
Twinned Spell.description:
消耗：1術法點

當你施放可以透過升環以指定額外生物作為目標的法術（例如魅惑人類）時，你可以消耗1術法點將該法術的生效環階提升1環。

Twinned Spell.name: 孿生法術
Twinned Spell.condition: 當你施放可以透過升環施法以指定額外生物作為目標的法術時

Subtle Spell.name: 精妙法術
Subtle Spell.description:
消耗：1術法點

當你施放法術時，你可以消耗 1 術法點忽略施放該法術所需的任何言語、姿勢或材料構材，除了法術中需被消耗或註明價值的材料構材

Thieves' Cant.name: 盜賊黑話
Thieves' Cant.description:
你在街頭巷尾中學會了多種語言，並在此掌握了盜賊間的黑話。你學會了盜賊黑話和另一門從@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbCreatingAChar.JournalEntryPage.t1WP9VEevo4TOTXw#choose-languages]{第二章}語言表中自選的語言。

Foundry Note

Thieves' Cant will be added to your sheet automatically and you will be prompted to choose the additional language.

Sculpt Spells.name: Sculpt Spells
Sculpt Spells.description: You can create pockets of relative safety within the effects of your evocations. When you cast an Evocation spell that affects other creatures that you can see, you can choose a number of them equal to 1 plus the spell's level. The chosen creatures automatically succeed on their saving throws against the spell, and they take no damage if they would normally take half damage on a successful save.

Intimidating Presence.description:
As a Bonus Action, you can strike terror into others with your menacing presence and primal power. When you do so, each creature of your choice in a 30-foot Emanation originating from you must make a Wisdom saving throw (DC 8 plus your Strength modifier and Proficiency Bonus). On a failed save, a creature has the Frightened condition for 1 minute. At the end of each of the &Reference[Frightened] creature's turns, the creature repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success.

Once you use this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a Long Rest unless you expend a use of your Rage (no action required) to restore your use of it.

Foundry Note

The Save activity includes an Active Effect which adds the Frightened condition.

The Recharge activity consumes a use of Rage and recharges your use of Intimidating Presence.
Intimidating Presence.name: Intimidating Presence

Magical Secrets.description: You've learned secrets from various magical traditions. Whenever you reach a Bard level (including this level) and the Prepared Spells number in the Bard Features table increases, you can choose any of your new prepared spells from the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.wwia6Wwo4BgE9GSI]{Bard}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.SkHptN2PTzFGDaEj]{Cleric}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.LhvuDQEyrCdg5EfU]{Druid}, and @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.6AnqLUowgdsqMFvz]{Wizard} spell lists, and the chosen spells count as Bard spells for you. In addition, whenever you replace a spell prepared for this class, you can replace it with a spell from those lists.
Magical Secrets.name: Magical Secrets

Primal Order.name: 原初誓約
Primal Order.description:
你已將自己奉獻給以下一種神聖使命：

【巫祝】你額外知曉一個從德魯伊法術列表中選擇的戲法。此外，你與自然的緊密聯繫使你的智力（奧秘或自然）檢定獲得等同於感知調整值的加值（至少+1）。

【衛士】接受戰鬥訓練後，你獲得軍用武器的熟練，並接受了中甲訓練。

Foundry Note

You will be prompted to choose during advancement.

Unarmored Movement.name: 無甲移動
Unarmored Movement.description:
未穿戴任何護甲與持握盾牌時，你的移動速度增加10呎。該加值將隨著武僧等級的提升而增加，具體數值詳見武僧特性表。

當前提升： [[lookup @scale.monk.unarmored-movement]]

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Unarmored Movement Active Effect which adds 10 feet to your Movement. It can not automatically update as you level up though. You can edit the value to match your current increase.

Warlock.name: 契術師
Warlock.description:
受異界契約賦能的神秘學家

核心契術師特徵

關鍵屬性

魅力

生命骰

每契術師等級D8

豁免熟練

感知與魅力

技能熟練

從奧秘、欺瞞、歷史、威嚇、調查、自然、宗教中選擇2項

武器熟練

簡易武器

護甲訓練

輕甲

起始裝備

選擇A或B： (A) @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbarmLeatherArm]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepSickle0000]、2把@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepDagger0000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagArcaneFocus]（@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbafcOrb0000000]）、 @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phiPN9UzkXk3i5xh]（秘學典籍）、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagScholarsPac]、 [[/award 15GP]]；(B) [[/award 100GP]]

契術師追尋隱於多元宇宙之下的知識。在追尋魔法力量之處，他們鑽研大量的禁忌學識，進而知曉了那些吸引著異界存在的法術，或是尋覓到了足以感受異界之力的神秘地點。在此之後，契術師便與一位強大的宗主簽下彼此綁定的契約。契術師們從天使、至高妖精、惡魔、魔鬼、鬼婆，乃至遙遠國度的外星存在處汲取著遠古學識，並將這些玄奧之秘拼湊起來，進而轉為自己的力量。

契術師們將自己的宗主視為一種資源，也可以說是他們獲取魔法力量的手段。某些契術師尊重、敬畏甚至熱愛他們的宗主；而另一些則並不那麼心甘情願為自己的宗主服務；有些人會嘗試削弱他們的宗主，即使自己所操弄的力量也正來自於它們。

一旦簽下契約，契術師對知識和力量的渴求便難以僅透過學習來滿足。大部分契術師畢生都在追求更卓越的力量與更深邃的知識，而這往往通向一條冒險之路。

成為契術師…

作為首級角色

  • 獲得契術師核心特徵表中的所有特徵。
  • 獲得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbWarlock000000.JournalEntryPage.znue6EaGDDXgeQb0#class-features]{契術師特性}表中列出的 1 級特性。

作為兼職角色

  • 獲得下列契術師核心特徵表中的特徵：生命骰和輕甲訓練。
  • 獲得契術師特性表中列出的 1 級特性。請參閱第 2 章的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbCreatingAChar.JournalEntryPage.vcs4jfEKRxPCsgXm]{兼職規則}來確定可用的法術位。

bwCLOdauuzoHofil.hint: 你獲得屬性值提升專長或另一個符合條件你所選擇的專長。當契術師等級達到8、12和16時，你將再次獲得此特性。

mRSh9oUVjLU33e7p.hint: 你獲得屬性值提升專長或另一個符合條件你所選擇的專長。當契術師等級達到8、12和16時，你將再次獲得此特性。

mhZh3LfLMa15tXee.hint: 你獲得屬性值提升專長或另一個符合條件你所選擇的專長。當契術師等級達到8、12和16時，你將再次獲得此特性。

FOf5CkGnSs0OlppY.hint: 你獲得屬性值提升專長或另一個符合條件你所選擇的專長。當契術師等級達到8、12和16時，你將再次獲得此特性。

KTLPtUpPuGbXWiap.hint: You gain a Warlock subclass of your choice. A subclass is a specialization that grants you features at certain Warlock levels. For the rest of your career, you gain each of your subclass’s features that are of your Warlock level or lower.

Eldritch Invocations.title: 魔能祈喚
Eldritch Invocations.hint: 發掘禁忌的知識殘章賦予了你恆久的魔法能力。

Contact Patron.title: 聯繫宗主
Contact Patron.hint: 在過往，想聯絡你的宗主都需要一些中間手段，但今時不同往日，你可以直接與他對話了。你始終準備著法術異界探知。

Epic Boon.title: 史詩恩惠
Epic Boon.hint: 你獲得一個史詩恩惠專長或另一個符合條件你所選擇的專長。推薦選擇扭曲命運恩惠。

Martial Arts.name: 武藝
Martial Arts.description:
你的武術訓練讓你掌握了使用徒手打擊和武僧武器的作戰方式，而武僧武器包括下列類型：

  • 簡易近戰武器
  • 具有輕型屬性的軍用近戰武器

當你徒手或僅使用武僧武器，並且未著裝護甲或持盾時，你獲得下列好處。

【額外徒手打擊】你能以附贈動作進行一次徒手打擊

【武藝骰】你可以使用1d6代替你徒手打擊和武僧武器的正常傷害。此傷害骰會在你達到特定的武僧等級後增加，如武僧特性表中的武藝一欄所示。

當前武藝骰：[[lookup @scale.monk.die]]

【敏捷攻擊】你可以使用敏捷調整值而非力量調整值進行徒手打擊和武僧武器的攻擊和傷害骰。此外，當你使用徒手打擊的推撞或擒抱選項時，你也可以使用敏捷調整值代替力量調整值來計算豁免DC。

Foundry Note

This feature includes activities for enchanting a weapon which adds a Monk Attack activity to it that integrates the changes mentioned above.

Master Light Martial Weapon.name: 武僧武器（輕型軍用武器）

Dragon Companion.name: Dragon Companion
Dragon Companion.description:
You can cast @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplSummonDrag]{Summon Dragon} without a Material component. You can also cast it once without a spell slot, and you regain the ability to cast it in this way when you finish a Long Rest.

Whenever you start casting the spell, you can modify it so that it doesn't require Concentration. If you do so, the spell's duration becomes 1 minute for that casting.

Foundry Note

This feature can be used for tracking your free usage. When you cast the spell you can uncheck the "Consumption" box and, optionally, the "Concentration" box.

Indomitable.description:
If you fail a saving throw, you can reroll it with a bonus equal to your Fighter level (currently, [[lookup @classes.fighter.levels]]). You must use the new roll, and you can't use this feature again until you finish a Long Rest.

You can use this feature twice before a Long Rest starting at level 13 and three times before a Long Rest starting at level 17.

Foundry Note

This feature's maximum usages scale automatically as you level up.
Indomitable.name: Indomitable

Retaliate.name: Retaliate
Retaliate.condition: When you take damage from a creature within 5 feet of you

Retaliation.name: Retaliation
Retaliation.description: When you take damage from a creature that is within 5 feet of you, you can take a Reaction to make one melee attack against that creature, using a weapon or an Unarmed Strike.

Bonus Proficiencies.name: 附贈熟練
Bonus Proficiencies.description: 你獲得三項你所選擇的技能熟練。

Deflect Attacks.name: 撥擋攻擊
Deflect Attacks.description:
當一個攻擊檢定命中你，並且其傷害包含鈍擊、穿刺或揮砍傷害時，你可以採取反應以減少攻擊對你造成的總傷害，減少的數值等同於1d10 + 你的敏捷調整值 + 你的武僧等級。

若你將傷害減少至0，你可以消耗1內力點以借力打力。撥擋近戰攻擊時，選擇距離你5呎內一個你所能看見的生物；撥擋遠程攻擊時，選擇距離你60呎內一個你所能看見且不處於全掩護後的生物。所選生物必須通過敏捷豁免檢定，否則將承受兩枚武藝骰 + 你的敏捷調整值的傷害，傷害類型與原攻擊的傷害類型一致。

Foundry Note

The Reduce activity can be used to heal yourself to reduce the total damage if it's not enough to reduce it to 0.

The Redirect activity can be used to roll damage and consume a use of your Focus Points if you can reduce it to 0. You can select the type of damage in the roll dialog. The dice increase automatically as you level up.

Reduce.name: 撥擋
Reduce.condition: 當一個攻擊檢定命中你，並且其傷害包含鈍擊、穿刺或揮砍傷害時

Arcane Apotheosis.name: 奧法極致
Arcane Apotheosis.description:
While your Innate Sorcery feature is active, you can use one Metamagic option on each of your turns without spending Sorcery Points on it.

Foundry Note

Uncheck the Consumption option when using the Metamagic option you would like to use for free.

Aura Expansion.description:
Your Aura of Protection is now a 30-foot Emanation.

Foundry Note

The range of your auras update automatically as you level up.
Aura Expansion.name: Aura Expansion

Potent Cantrip.description:
Your damaging cantrips affect even creatures that avoid the brunt of the effect. When you cast a cantrip at a creature and you miss with the attack roll or the target succeeds on a saving throw against the cantrip, the target takes half the cantrip's damage (if any) but suffers no additional effect from the cantrip.

Foundry Note

With their token selected you can either right click on the damage roll's chat card and select  Apply Half Damage or click the "1/2" button and then the  Apply button.
Potent Cantrip.name: Potent Cantrip

Oath of Devotion.name: 奉獻之誓
Oath of Devotion.description:
Uphold the Ideals of Justice and Order

The Oath of Devotion binds Paladins to the ideals of justice and order. These Paladins meet the archetype of the knight in shining armor. They hold themselves to the highest standards of conduct, and some—for better or worse—hold the rest of the world to the same standards.

Many who swear this oath are devoted to gods of law and good and use their gods’ tenets as the measure of personal devotion. Others hold angels as their ideals and incorporate images of angelic wings into their helmets or coats of arms.

These paladins share the following tenets:

  • Let your word be your promise.
  • Protect the weak and never fear to act.
  • Let your honorable deeds be an example.

Sneak Attack.name: 偷襲
Sneak Attack.description:
你知曉如何精確地攻擊分心的敵人。每回合一次，若你使用靈巧或遠程武器進行攻擊並在擲骰具有優勢時，你可以對你以攻擊檢定命中的生物造成額外1d6傷害。該額外傷害的類型與你武器的傷害類型相同。

若目標的5呎內至少有一名同伴，且其未陷入無力狀態，而你的攻擊檢定也不具劣勢時，則你無需在進行攻擊檢定時具有優勢。

該額外傷害會隨著遊蕩者等級的提升而增加，如遊蕩者特性表中偷襲一欄所示。

【當前偷襲傷害】 [[lookup @scale.rogue.sneak-attack]]

Foundry Note

Your sneak attack damage will automatically scale as you level up. You can select the damage type in the damage roll's dialog box.

Dragon Wings.name: Dragon Wings

Winged.name: Winged
Winged.description: he wings last for 1 hour or until you dismiss them (no action required). For the duration, you have a Fly Speed of 60 feet.

Dragon Wings.description:
As a Bonus Action, you can cause draconic wings to appear on your back. The wings last for 1 hour or until you dismiss them (no action required). For the duration, you have a Fly Speed of 60 feet.

Once you use this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a Long Rest unless you spend 3 Sorcery Points (no action required) to restore your use of it.

Foundry Note

The Dragon Wings activity includes an Active Effect that grants you a Fly Speed of 60 feet.

The Restore Use activity can be used to expend the Sorcery Points to restore a use of the Dragon Wings activity.

Extra Attack.name: 額外攻擊
Extra Attack.description: 每當你在你的回合採取攻擊動作時，你可以攻擊兩次，而非一次。

Greater Divine Intervention.name: Greater Divine Intervention
Greater Divine Intervention.description:
You can call on even more powerful divine intervention. When you use your Divine Intervention feature, you can choose @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplWish000000]{Wish} when you select a spell. If you do so, you can't use Divine Intervention again until you finish [[/r 2d4]] Long Rests.

Foundry Note

This feature will consume a use of your Divine Intervention but it can not automatically recharge the usage after the rolled number of Long Rests.

phbpdnEpicBoon00.name: 史詩恩惠
phbpdnEpicBoon00.description:
You gain an @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbFeats00000000.JournalEntryPage.GxfrwkJbrIvn7reC]{Epic Boon feat} or another feat of your choice for which you qualify. @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.feats.Item.phbBoonofTruesig]{Boon of Truesight} is recommended.

Foundry Note

You will be prompted for a choice while leveling up.

Bardic Inspiration.name: 吟遊激勵
Bardic Inspiration.description:
你可以透過言語、音樂或舞蹈以超自然地激勵他人。此激勵表現為你的吟遊激勵骰，會由d6開始（當前[[lookup @scale.bard.inspiration.die]]）。

【使用吟遊激勵】作為一個附贈動作，你可以激勵自身60呎內能看見或聽見你的另一個生物。該生物獲得一枚你的吟遊激勵骰。一個生物在一次只能擁有一枚吟遊激勵骰。

在接下來的一小時以內一次，當一個生物在D20檢定上失敗時，該生物可以擲吟遊激勵骰，並將其數值添加在d20上，此舉可能將失敗轉為成功。當擲出吟遊激勵骰時其將被消耗。

【使用次數】你可以賦予吟遊激勵骰的次數等同於你的魅力調整值（最少一次），並在你完成一次長休時重獲所有已消耗次數。

【在更高等級】當你達到特定吟遊詩人等級時，你的吟遊激勵骰將發生變化，如吟遊詩人特性表上的吟遊激勵骰欄所示。在5級時變成d8，10級時變成d10，15級時變成d12。

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect for tracking when a character has Bardic Inspiration to use.

Recovery is set to long rest (for levels before @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.classes.Item.phbbrdFontOfInsp]{Font of Inspiration} is gained). Please manually adjust as required.

Inspired.name: 激勵
Inspired.description: 你已獲得吟遊激勵，在接下來的一小時以內一次，當你在D20檢定上失敗時，你可以擲吟遊激勵骰，並將其數值添加在d20上，此舉可能將失敗轉為成功。當擲出吟遊激勵骰時其將被消耗。

Action Surge.name: 動作如潮
Action Surge.description:
你可以短暫地驅策自己超越你的極限。在你回合中，你可以採取一次除了魔法動作外的額外動作。

一旦你使用此能力，你必須完成一次短休或長休後才能再次使用。從17級開始，你可以在一次休息前使用它二次，但同個回合只能使用一次。

Foundry Note

This feature includes a limited use that increases automatically at level 17.

Spell Mastery.name: Spell Mastery
Spell Mastery.description:
You have achieved such mastery over certain spells that you can cast them at will. Choose a level 1 and a level 2 spell in your spellbook that have a casting time of an action. You always have those spells prepared, and you can cast them at their lowest level without expending a spell slot. To cast either spell at a higher level, you must expend a spell slot.

Whenever you finish a Long Rest, you can study your spellbook and replace one of those spells with an eligible spell of the same level from the book.

Foundry Note

The Master activity includes an enchantment that marks the spells as "Always Prepared" and adds ", Mastered" to their name for easy identification.

Uncheck the "Consumption" box when casting at the lowest level. You can drag multiple spells to the same chat card.

Defensive Tactics.description:
You gain one of the following feature options of your choice. Whenever you finish a Short or Long Rest, you can replace the chosen option with the other one.

Bard.name: 吟遊詩人
Bard.description:
集音樂舞蹈魔法於一身的激昂演藝家

核心吟遊詩人特徵

關鍵屬性

魅力

生命骰

每吟遊詩人等級D8

豁免熟練

敏捷和魅力

技能熟練

選擇任意3個技能

武器熟練

簡易武器

工具熟練

選擇3種樂器

護甲訓練

輕甲

起始裝備

選擇A或B： (A) @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbarmLeatherArm]、2把@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepDagger0000]、你所選擇的樂器、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagEntertainer]、[[/award 19gp]]；或(B) [[/award 90GP]]

通過音樂、舞蹈、詩歌施放魔法，吟遊詩人是鼓舞他人、撫慰傷痛、打擊敵人和製造幻象的能手。他們認為多元宇宙是被“說”出來的，而那原初的創世真言至今在各個位面迴響。詩人的音樂就是對這迴響的一種操控，試圖將其編織成所需的法術與力量。

任何事物都可以激發他們創作出新的歌曲或故事，所以詩人往往對萬事萬物都具有好奇心。他們的知識廣博如同大海，演奏音樂施展魔法都是信手拈來，緩和氣氛也是一把好手。

吟遊詩人的一生都在大地巡遊中度過，他們搜集逸聞、分享故事、然後享受聽眾的掌聲。這跟一般藝人其實沒區別，只是在知識的深度，音樂技巧的層次，對魔法的觸動上，吟遊詩人就不能和那些普通貨色相比了。

吟遊詩人的表演曲目

你的吟遊詩人會一邊擊鼓、一邊高唱遠古英雄的事蹟嗎？彈奏魯特琴、低吟愛情小調？演唱激昂動人的詠嘆調？背誦經典悲劇中的戲劇獨白？運用民間舞蹈的節奏，引導戰場上盟友的動作？還是創作一些不太正經的打油詩？

當你扮演吟遊詩人時，請思考你偏好的藝術表演風格、你可能喚起的情緒，以及啟發你創作主題的靈感來源。你的詩句是源自對自然美景的讚頌，還是對失落的沉思？你偏好高遠的聖歌，還是熱鬧的酒館小曲？你傾心於為逝者哀悼，還是為歡樂而慶賀？你跳的是歡快的吉格舞，還是華麗繁複的詮釋性編舞？你專精於單一風格，還是追求精通百藝？

成為吟遊詩人...

作為首級角色

  • 獲得吟遊詩人核心特徵表中的所有特徵。
  • 獲得吟遊詩人特性表中列出的 1 級特性。

作為兼職角色

  • 獲得吟遊詩人核心特徵表中下列特徵：生命骰，一項自選技能的熟練，一種自選樂器的熟練，以及輕甲訓練。
  • 獲得吟遊詩人特性表中列出的 1 級特性。請參閱第 2 章中的兼職規則來確定你的可用法術位。

Cleric.name: 牧師
Cleric.description:
以神力降下奇蹟的教士

牧師核心特徵

關鍵屬性

感知

生命骰

每牧師等級D8

豁免熟練

感知與魅力

技能熟練

從歷史、洞悉、醫藥、說服、宗教中選擇兩項

武器熟練

簡易武器

護甲訓練

輕甲、中甲、盾牌

起始裝備

選擇A或B： (A) @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbarmChainShirt]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbarmShield0000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepMace000000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagHolySymbolV]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagPriestsPack]、[[/award 7GP]]； (B) [[/award 110GP]]

牧師們從諸神領域中汲取力量，以之展現奇蹟。受到神祇、神系或其他非凡存在的祝福，牧師得以感應到神明所在的外層位面之力，並將那神聖的魔法用於普渡眾生，懲擊敵寇。

牧師們的力量即是神明的恩賜，因此他們常常侍奉於那些賦予自身魔法的神祇或非凡之力的神廟中。掌控對神聖魔法的運用並非依賴專項訓練，而需要牧師們從祈禱和儀式中學會如何獲取外層位面的神力。

當然，並非所有神廟或神社的成員都是牧師。還有一些祭司被召至神廟中，僅僅過著簡單的侍僧生活，透過祈禱和儀式而非魔法來實現他們對神明的獻身。許多凡人都聲稱自己能為諸神代言，但很少有人能像牧師那樣真正調動諸神的力量。

成為牧師…

作為首級角色

  • 獲得牧師核心特徵表中的所有特徵。
  • 獲得牧師特性表中列出的1級特性。

作為兼職角色

  • 獲得下列牧師核心特徵表中的特徵：生命骰以及輕甲、中甲和盾牌的訓練。
  • 獲得牧師特性表中列出的1級特性。請參閱第 2 章中的兼職規則以確定你的可用法術位。

Stunning Strike.name: 震懾拳
Stunning Strike.description:
Once per turn when you hit a creature with a Monk weapon or an Unarmed Strike, you can expend 1 Focus Point to attempt a stunning strike. The target must make a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, the target has the Stunned condition until the start of your next turn. On a successful save, the target's Speed is halved until the start of your next turn, and the next attack roll made against the target before then has Advantage.

Foundry Note

This feature includes the Saving Throw and a Stunned Active Effect which applies the Stunned status if they fail and a Slowed Active Effect for tracking that their Speed is halved and that the next attack roll made against them has Advantage if they succeed.

save.condition: Once per turn when you hit a creature with a Monk weapon or an Unarmed Strike

Monk.name: 武僧
Monk.description:
超凡脫俗的武術家

核心武僧特徵

關鍵屬性

敏捷和感知

生命骰

每武僧等級D8

豁免熟練

力量與敏捷

技能熟練

從特技、運動、歷史、洞悉、宗教或隱匿中選擇2項

武器熟練

簡易武器以及擁有輕型屬性的軍用武器

工具熟練

任選一種工匠工具或樂器

護甲訓練

無

起始裝備

選擇A或B： (A) @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepSpear00000]、5把@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepDagger0000]、上述工具熟練所選擇的工匠工具或樂器、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagExplorersPa]、[[/award 11GP]]；(B) [[/award 50GP]]

武僧們靠著嚴苛的戰鬥訓練和精神修煉，令身心與多元宇宙調諧並知曉如何集中內在的力量。不同的武僧對這股力量有著不同的解讀，比如說呼吸、能量、生命力、精華或自相。在武僧的手中，這股力量時而化作迅猛狂暴的武術與戰技，時而化作精巧快速的身法與防禦。

武僧們凝聚自身的內在之力實現各種非凡之舉，甚至足以超脫自然。不論是否手持武器，他們的攻擊在如此技藝下兼具驚人的速度與力量。即使是最基本的武具在武僧手中也能化為神兵利器。

許多武僧認為持戒禁慾的生活有助於維持身心專注，以此能令自己更好地駕馭力量。也有其他武僧認為，沉浸在紛亂的世俗生活中才有助於增強他們的決心和戒律。

武僧通常將冒險視為對肉體和精神成長的考驗。他們的驅動力不僅僅是戰勝怪物和尋獲財寶，更是希望磨練自己至爐火純青。

成為武僧…

作為首級角色

  • 獲得武僧核心特徵表中的所有特徵。
  • 獲得武僧特性表中列出的 1 級特性。

作為兼職角色

  • 獲得武僧核心特徵表中的生命骰。
  • 獲得武僧特性表中列出的 1 級特性。
